**Job Description**
 Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
 **Project Controls Director** 
 to join our team!
   

  

 The Project Controls Director will lead all aspects of cost, schedule, risk, and change management across a complex development program. This role requires extensive experience, strong leadership capabilities, and deep technical knowledge of project controls best practices.
   

  

 The Director will ensure robust governance, accurate forecasting, transparent reporting, and high\-performance execution to support successful project delivery while maintaining schedule certainty and financial control.
   

  

 What You'll Be Doing;
   

  

* Establish, manage, and enforce the overall project controls strategy, systems, procedures, and reporting frameworks across the program.
* Develop project control plans, governance models, and performance measurement systems aligned with client and program objectives.
* Ensure integration of cost, schedule, risk, and change management across all phases of the project lifecycle.
* Implement best practices, policies, and standards for project controls across all project packages and delivery teams.
* Oversee the preparation, review, and approval of the integrated master schedule, ensuring alignment across engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, and handover activities.
* Monitor schedule progress and performance, identifying delays, potential impacts, and mitigation strategies.
* Evaluate contractor schedules to ensure compliance with contractual obligations and project milestones.
* Implement advanced scheduling methodologies such as critical path analysis, schedule risk assessment, and resource\-loaded scheduling.
* Provide schedule forecasts and recovery strategies to support proactive project management.
* Direct all cost engineering functions including cost estimating, cost control, cash flow forecasting, and budget monitoring.
* Establish project cost baselines and ensure accurate tracking of expenditures against approved budgets.
* Lead monthly cost reporting, forecasting, and variance analysis to ensure financial transparency and control.
* Analyze cost trends and recommend corrective actions to maintain financial performance.
* Ensure alignment with performance measurement frameworks such as Earned Value Management (EVM).
* Lead the development and implementation of comprehensive project risk management frameworks.
* Facilitate risk identification workshops, qualitative and quantitative risk assessments, and mitigation planning.
* Oversee schedule and cost risk modeling to support decision\-making and contingency allocation.
* Monitor risk exposure, mitigation effectiveness, and escalation of critical risks to senior leadership.
* Maintain an active risk register and ensure proactive management of project uncertainties.
* Direct the management of project changes and variations to ensure proper evaluation, documentation, and integration into project baselines.
* Establish and maintain structured change control processes and governance.
* Facilitate Change Control Board (CCB) meetings and ensure transparent decision\-making.
* Collaborate with commercial and contract teams in evaluating claims, entitlement assessments, and negotiation strategies.
* Ensure accurate tracking of project trends, early warning notices, and potential claims exposure.
* Oversee preparation of executive\-level reports, dashboards, and key performance indicators (KPIs).
* Ensure consistent, transparent, and timely reporting of project performance, risks, and opportunities.
* Present complex project performance data in clear and actionable formats for executive leadership and stakeholders.
* Provide strategic insights to support informed decision\-making at program level.
* Lead the evaluation, implementation, and optimization of project controls systems and digital platforms.
* Promote continuous improvement through automation, advanced analytics, and performance monitoring tools.
* Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity across all project controls systems.
* Establish standardized processes and documentation practices to maintain audit readiness.
* Introduce innovative technologies and methodologies to enhance forecasting accuracy and reporting efficiency.
* Lead and manage a multidisciplinary project controls team including planners, schedulers, cost engineers, risk specialists, and reporting analysts.
* Build and maintain high\-performing teams focused on collaboration, accountability, and technical excellence.
* Conduct performance evaluations and support professional development and training initiatives.
* Foster a culture of data accuracy, continuous improvement, and operational discipline.
* Collaborate closely with engineering, construction, procurement, contracts, finance, and operational teams to ensure alignment across the project lifecycle.
* Coordinate with senior stakeholders, project partners, contractors, and consultants.
* Proactively identify and resolve project issues to ensure seamless integration of project controls strategies.
* Ensure effective cross\-functional communication and coordination across all project delivery teams.


 What Required Skills You'll Bring;
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Project Management, or a related discipline.
* Master’s degree in Project Management, Engineering, or Business Administration is preferred.
* Minimum 25 years of experience in project controls within major capital projects.
* At least 15 years in senior leadership roles managing large project controls teams.
* Extensive experience in cost control, planning \& scheduling, risk management, and performance reporting.
* Demonstrated experience managing complex, multi\-contractor programs with significant budgets.
* Expert proficiency in Primavera P6, cost management systems, and project performance analytics tools.
* Strong understanding of project lifecycle management, construction sequencing, and design\-development processes.
* Proven leadership capabilities managing large multidisciplinary teams.
* Advanced analytical and problem\-solving skills with strong attention to detail.
* Excellent organizational and decision\-making abilities.
* Strong communication and presentation skills, particularly in executive\-level reporting.
* Comprehensive understanding of contract management, procurement processes, and claims evaluation.
* Professional certifications such as PMP, PSP, CCP, EVP, PMI\-SP, RMP, or equivalent.
* Experience leading project controls functions on large and complex programs.
* Expertise in digital project controls platforms and data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
* Experience working under international contract frameworks such as FIDIC.
* Strong business acumen with the ability to interpret project performance data and guide strategic decisions.
* Ability to operate effectively in fast\-paced, high\-pressure environments with multiple stakeholders.


 Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
   

  

 We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!

**JOB TITLE**
**Public Policy Associate Director**
**Job Location:** 
 Riyadh
   

  

**Reports To:** 
 Corporate Affairs Director
   

  

**About Astrazeneca**
 AstraZeneca is a global, science\-led, patient\-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation of prescription medicines for some of the world’s most serious diseases. But we’re more than one of the world’s leading pharmaceutical companies.
   

  

**Site Description**
***AstraZeneca is experiencing a significant transformation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, driven by a commitment to advancing healthcare, innovation, and sustainable growth. Building on our global legacy, AZ KSA is rapidly evolving its operations to better serve patients, collaborate with healthcare stakeholders, and contribute to the ambitious goals outlined in the Saudi Vision 2030\. We are investing in talent, digital solutions, and new ways of working; all designed to enhance our impact on patient outcomes and reinforce our leadership in therapeutic areas. This dynamic environment calls for visionary, agile professionals who thrive in change and are motivated to help shape the future of healthcare in KSA.***
**Role Summary**
 The
 **Public Policy Associate Director** 
 is responsible for shaping, executing, and advancing AstraZeneca’s policy and advocacy strategy in support of the business unit’s portfolio and objectives. Reporting to the Gulf Corporate Affairs Director, this leadership role focuses on analyzing and influencing the external policy environment, identifying opportunities and risks, and guiding the organization’s engagement with critical stakeholders. The position works cross\-functionally with commercial, medical, regulatory, and government affairs colleagues to support patient access, drive business priorities, and ensure alignment with AstraZeneca’s mission and values.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain a deep understanding of the policy landscape affecting AstraZeneca’s disease products, anticipating emerging trends and regulatory changes.
* Monitor relevant legislation, regulations, and advocacy activities to ensure compliance and proactively address potential risks to the business unit’s interests.
* Lead the design, implementation, and evaluation of public policy and advocacy projects that advance therapeutic access, reimbursement, and innovation for the respective therapy area(s).
* Assess and grow internal policy shaping capabilities, with a particular focus on ensuring alignment between national priorities and our therapy area\-specific objectives.
* Ensuring KSA policy strategies are aligned with AstraZeneca’s global policy framework and contribute to broader corporate affairs strategy and must wins.
* Build and sustain relationships with key external stakeholders, including policymakers, senior government officials, patient advocacy groups, medical societies, NGOs, and industry associations.
* Serve as a strategic advisor to cross\-functional teams, ensuring alignment between policy priorities and business goals. Act as a subject matter expert for policy\-related input into brand plans, regulatory submissions, market access, and lifecycle management.
* Develop impactful policy position statements, white papers, briefings, and other communication materials for internal and external audiences.
* Track and report key policy and advocacy outcomes, supporting continuous improvement in strategy and execution.


**Essential For The Role**
* Bachelor’s degree in Public Health, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, or a related discipline required; Master’s degree in Public Policy, Health Economics, or a relevant field strongly preferred.
* Minimum of 3 years’ experience in healthcare policy, government affairs, or advocacy roles, with proven success in the pharmaceutical, biotech, or healthcare sector.
* Experience influencing public policy at national and/or international levels, including shaping legislative frameworks.
* Strong knowledge of regulatory and reimbursement environments relevant to AstraZeneca’s therapy areas.
* Familiarity with market access, pricing, and reimbursement challenges in innovative therapeutics.
* Exceptional analytical, interpersonal, and communication skills. Demonstrated ability to manage complex projects and lead cross\-functional initiatives.
* Strategic thinker, results\-oriented, and adept at navigating ambiguous and evolving policy environments.
* Ability to represent AstraZeneca externally with credibility and impact.
* High agility in stakeholder management and consensus\-building across diverse groups.


**Why AstraZeneca?**
 At AstraZeneca we’re dedicated to being a Great Place to Work. Where you are empowered to push the boundaries of science and unleash your entrepreneurial spirit. There’s no better place to make a difference to medicine, patients, and society. An inclusive culture that champions diversity and collaboration, and always committed to lifelong learning, growth, and development. We’re on an exciting journey to pioneer the future of healthcare.
   

  

**So, what’s next?**
* Are you already imagining yourself joining our team? Good, because we can’t wait to hear from you.
* Are you ready to bring new ideas and fresh thinking to the table? Brilliant! We have one seat available, and we hope it’s yours.


**Where can I find out more?**
 Our Social Media, Follow AstraZeneca on LinkedIn
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Facebook
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Instagram
   

  

**Date Posted**
 03\-Apr\-2026
   

  

**Closing Date**
 14\-Apr\-2026
   

  

 AstraZeneca embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry\-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non\-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

 Reporting to the Project Director, the Design Director leads all airport design management activities across disciplines, ensuring technical ex
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Design Director\- Airport to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 Reporting to the Project Director, the Design Director leads all airport design management activities across disciplines, ensuring technical excellence and full compliance with programme requirements. The role provides strategic oversight of design quality, innovation, design integration, and design‑related risk mitigation. The Design Director will coordinate multidisciplinary design teams, manage design progress, and ensure seamless integration of design deliverables with construction, operational, and stakeholder needs. They also serve as the primary interface for resolving complex technical issues across the project.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Design Leadership \& Oversight**
* Lead and manage all design activities across architectural, structural, airside, landside, MEP, and specialist disciplines.
* Drive technical excellence, consistency, and alignment with WSP design standards and aviation best practices.
* Ensure design deliverables fully align with project objectives, scope, and regulatory requirements.


**Multidisciplinary Design Management**
* Coordinate and supervise multidisciplinary design teams, ensuring timely progress of all design packages.
* Oversee integration of design outputs with procurement, construction, commissioning, and airport operational needs.
* Review and validate technical submissions, drawings, specifications, and design reports.


**Stakeholder \& Client Coordination**
* Act as the main technical interface with the client, authorities, airport operators, and key stakeholders.
* Facilitate design workshops, technical meetings, and design reviews to resolve issues and align expectations.
* Provide clear, authoritative guidance on design matters to support informed decision ‑ making.


**Quality, Safety \& Compliance**
* Champion design quality, innovation, sustainability, and compliance with local and international aviation codes.
* Implement quality assurance processes aligned with WSP global design standards.
* Ensure design solutions meet safety, regulatory, and operational requirements throughout the project lifecycle.


**Risk \& Change Management**
* Identify design risks early, propose mitigation strategies, and manage design ‑ related changes effectively.
* Support the Project Director in managing scope, change orders, and design ‑ related commercial impacts.


**Team Leadership \& Collaboration**
* Mentor and guide design managers, discipline leads, and wider technical teams.
* Promote a collaborative environment across WSP offices in KSA, UAE, India, and other regions.
* Ensure resource planning and performance management support project delivery demands.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in architecture or engineering (Master’s degree preferred).
* 15–20\+ years’ experience in airport or major infrastructure design delivery.
* Strong background leading multidisciplinary design teams in PMC or consultancy environments.
* Experience with airport terminal design, airside/landside infrastructure, or large ‑ scale aviation modernisation projects (KSA experience advantageous).


**Technical Competencies**
* Expert understanding of aviation design standards, ICAO codes, NFPA, and relevant regulatory frameworks.
* Strong design integration and coordination capability across disciplines.
* Skilled in design review, technical validation, and risk ‑ based decision ‑ making.


**Behavioural Competencies**
* Strong leadership presence with excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills.
* Solution ‑ driven, proactive, and resilient under pressure.
* Ability to influence senior stakeholders on technical and strategic matters.

data.raw_snippet:

**Essential Roles and Resp
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose** 




 To Direct, oversee and manage the delivery of construction projects (buildings and fit outs projects) of the group (new/ existing), ensuring completion of projects within the agreed specification/ quality standards, budgets and timelines.
 



  





**Essential Roles and Responsibilities** 



* Provides leadership and strategic guidance, and supporting the development of business strategies to deliver the required levels of productivity
* Contribute to the development of Project Management Department Strategy, in conjunction with Director, ensuring alignment to the objectives and strategy of the organization.
* Participate in the development, review and reporting of the policies and procedures framework (Audit, Document Control, Financial and Accounting, Design Compliance and Corporate Identity, QC, HSE) that allow the function to effectively meet its objectives and targets, in line with Project Management department policies and procedures in line with Group’s strategy and direction.
* Puts resource strategies in place and manages resource costs to overhead budgets.
* Review and report to Director on strategic decisions during the entire lifecycle of the projects.
* Contribute strategic support the group legal department in case of any necessity in terms of claim and disputes with consultants and contractors.
* Provide guidance to other internal business units and departments in terms of budget, timing and strategy throughout the project execution stage
* In conjunction with the other business units, develop a business plan setting out the strategies which will deliver the organizations longer\-term goals.
* Manage the design and project execution of projects with Al Tayer Real Estate, Al Tayer Motor and private projects getting developed by directors, by contracting external designers/consultants/contractors, finalize the same for implementation and ensure that the agreed design and project milestone deliverables are met in accordance with the project program.
* Implement approved procedures for tendering, selection and appointment of contractors, payment terms, dealings and communications between all parties in coordination with group legal functions.
* Implement internal processes and manage, to ensure that all contracts / agreements with contractors, suppliers and consultants are agreed, finalized and signed off before commencement of work, to avoid any legal dispute/claims etc. post execution.
* Oversee the development of project schedules, which include key project milestones and critical paths to ensure adherence and take corrective action as appropriate and work in consolidation with Operations, Business Units, and developer to accomplish its objectives within the constraints of time, quality and agreed cost.
* Liaise with Business units to understand the requirements and specifications of new projects and maintain an awareness of principle requirements in the design of the projects, ensuring they are considered in the execution stage.
* Review designs, recommend ideas/concepts to ensure that layouts effectively maximize functionality and aesthetic expectations of the projects by ensuring HSE compliance as per approved group policies.
* Oversee the Review and approve the drawings submitted by contractors and ensure that they are examined by all parties concerned.
* Manage the tender process effectively to ensure that all contractors, vendors, consultants selected are most capable of carrying out project requirements.
* Ensures that there are effective contract and documentation procedures in place to deliver legally complaint projects and minimize costs and risks.
* Ensure that CAPEX for all new projects are submitted to the business in a timely manner for review and approval.
* Monitors contractors’ work for compliance with schedule, budget, quality, safety, and overall conformance with the contract documents
* Owns the Health and Safety policy for Construction and puts processes and systems in place to monitor its compliance and share best practice.
* Oversee the changes process during project life cycle, which includes identifying, documenting, and controlling changes to the scope baseline, are validated and mechanism for the project management team to consistently communicate and seek approval of all changes from the stakeholders through set policies of using change control forms etc, is being adhered to.
* Identify possible risks for all upcoming and ongoing projects, ensure proactive risk plans to manage and mitigate risks and engage in a proactive communication strategy with clients and stakeholders. Puts in place effective risk management processes to identify, quantify, monitor and minimize risks in projects.
* Resolves field construction problems in coordination with engineering staff, third parties, and other agencies as necessary.
* Maintain updated projects matrix for current and upcoming projects based on agreed project master plan. Conduct quarterly audits on projects processes to ensure compliance and adherence to agreed policies and procedures.
* Identify opportunities to make use of external contractors and subcontractors, establish and maintain relationship with trusted organizations that meet the group requirements.
* Oversee the development of vendor and supplier list in database for the supply of right products for the projects.
* Oversee snagging and handover of projects by consultant and contractor to ensure the overall readiness of the project for commencement of business operations.
* To oversee the co\-ordination of the communication strategy within the project to ensure all stakeholders and interested concerned parties receive the information they want at the appropriate time.
* Establish a culture / process of value engineering within project team and look for more cost\-effective methods to achieve the same.
* Maintain an awareness of legislative and regulatory requirements and ensure conformance to all quality, health and safety regulations.
* Ensure effective and proper contract governance is implemented prior to project completion.
* Provide the director with advice and expertise on critical issues regarding the project, and implementation
* Liaises with the Finance Director to track the financial performance of Construction and ensures that Finance receive accurate information in a timely and organized manner
* Follow up and monitor the external governmental rules and regulations to ensure newly developing rules and regulations are well captured and implemented in projects
* Sets a culture of continuous improvement including the setup of processes and committees to learn and share best practice.
* Provide Leadership and direction to subordinate towards the achievement of goals and objectives.
* Guide and motivate subordinates to enhance performance and produce quality work, and ensure that they are continuously developed for higher level roles.
* Set targets, objectives and clear responsibilities for all supervised staff, progressively monitor individual performance against the agreed criteria and conduct formal appraisals in keeping with time frames
* Prepare performance evaluation and appraisal reports of direct reports to assess subordinates productivity and progress and identify training needs of team members to improve efficiency and ensure conformity with standard procedures and practices
* Provides mentoring support to direct team and other colleagues across the business in line with the succession plans



  





**Education, Skills and Experiences** 



* Degree in Civil Engineering or an equivalent technical qualification relevant to Construction Project Management.
* 15 years of experience in construction field

data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Project Director – Aviation to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 The Project Director holds full accountability for the successful delivery of a major aviation programme within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, with a strong emphasis on airport design modernisation and infrastructure enhancement. This senior leadership role provides strategic direction to multi ‑ disciplinary teams, ensures strict alignment with client and contractual expectations, and represents WSP at the highest levels with authorities, stakeholders, and executive decision ‑ makers. The position carries responsibility for the complete spectrum of project performance, including schedule management, technical delivery, quality assurance, risk mitigation, and commercial governance.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Strategic Leadership \& Governance**
* Provide strategic direction and leadership to all project teams operating on\-site and across remote support functions.
* Establish and maintain a strong governance framework ensuring clarity of roles, responsibilities, reporting lines, and escalation protocols.
* Drive a culture of delivery excellence, safety, compliance, and continuous improvement.


**Client \& Stakeholder Management**
* Serve as the primary point of contact for the client, ensuring transparent communication, alignment on objectives, and proactive issue resolution.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with senior client representatives, aviation authorities, regulatory bodies, and key external stakeholders.
* Represent WSP in high\-level steering committees, progress reviews, and commercial discussions.


**Project Delivery \& Execution**
* Lead the overall delivery of the aviation project from initiation to handover, ensuring compliance with contractual, technical, and statutory requirements.
* Oversee planning, design, construction, and commissioning phases, ensuring deliverables meet required standards.
* Monitor schedule performance, identify critical paths, and implement recovery plans when required.


**Quality Assurance \& Technical Oversight**
* Ensure adherence to WSP quality frameworks, aviation standards, and global best practice.
* Drive technical excellence across all engineering, design, and operational workstreams.
* Review and validate key technical submissions, design packages, and project deliverables.


**Risk, Safety \& Compliance**
* Establish and manage a robust risk management strategy, covering technical, commercial, operational, and external risks.
* Champion a strong safety culture, ensuring compliance with HSE regulations and WSP safety principles.
* Implement proactive measures to mitigate project risks and ensure long\-term programme stability.


**Commercial, Financial \& Contract Management**
* Provide oversight of all commercial activities including contract performance, change management, claims avoidance, and budget control.
* Ensure financial integrity through accurate forecasting, cost monitoring, and commercial reporting.
* Lead commercial negotiations where required, safeguarding WSP’s contractual and financial position.


**Team Leadership \& People Management**
* Lead, mentor, and develop a high\-performing multi\-disciplinary project team.
* Ensure optimal resource planning, performance management, and succession planning.
* Promote collaboration across WSP teams in KSA, the UAE, and global support offices.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Aviation Management, or related discipline (Master’s preferred).
* 20\+ years of experience in project and programme delivery, with significant exposure to large\-scale aviation, airports, or complex infrastructure programmes.
* Proven track record in leading multi\-billion SAR aviation or transport projects in the Middle East (KSA experience preferred).
* Strong background in PMC/consultancy environments with familiarity in contract administration (FIDIC or similar).


**Technical \& Leadership Competencies**
* Deep understanding of aviation standards, airport systems, airside/landside operations, and regulatory frameworks.
* Exceptional stakeholder management and executive communication skills.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience managing large budgets and complex contracts.
* Ability to lead diverse teams across multiple geographies and disciplines.

data.jd_text:
**Role Overview:** 




 We are seeking a senior crypto trading leader to build, lead, and scale a new chapter in our digital asset trading capabilities. This is a strategic and hands\-on role responsible for shaping and advancing the firm’s crypto trading, liquidity, exchange infrastructure, and derivatives capabilities. The role spans
 **OTC, perpetuals, funding logic, market making, liquidity sourcing, hedging, and market structure design** 
 , while also playing an important part in the strategy surrounding token\-related initiatives, exchange engagement, and broader platform growth.
 



  





 The ideal candidate will bring a strong combination of
 **trading leadership, derivatives expertise, liquidity and market\-making experience, token exposure, and operational depth** 
 . They should understand how to build and scale a crypto trading function that is commercially effective, technically sound, and aligned with a more structured and institutional operating environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




**Trading Leadership \& Strategy** 



* Lead and scale the crypto trading function across Spot, Derivatives, OTC, and Market Making.
* Define and execute the overall trading strategy in alignment with the company’s growth plans, platform roadmap, and commercial objectives.
* Take ownership of the trading desk’s performance, operating model, and long\-term capability buildout.
* Develop a clear framework for how the business prices risk, sources liquidity, manages execution, and supports product growth.



**Derivatives, OTC \& Pricing** 



* Lead the design and launch of the derivatives trading capability from the ground up, including perpetual products, funding logic, hedging frameworks, and exposure management — this is a greenfield build requiring someone who has stood up a derivatives desk before.
* Lead the development of OTC pricing and execution frameworks, including liquidity sourcing, cross\-venue hedging logic, and real\-time pricing across crypto and fiat pairs.
* Ensure pricing, execution, and risk systems reflect actual market behaviour and support sustainable commercial performance.
* Improve the desk’s ability to manage complex market conditions, funding dynamics, and non\-linear risk.



**Market Making, Liquidity \& Market Structure** 



* Design and oversee
 **market\-making strategies** 
 to optimise liquidity, spreads, order book depth, and execution efficiency.
* Define and execute
 **liquidity strategy across exchanges and providers** 
 , improving access, reducing slippage, and enhancing execution quality.
* Shape
 **market structure, execution workflows, and venue strategy** 
 to support client flow and platform growth.
* Develop frameworks to manage
 **flow dynamics, adverse selection, and client behaviour** 
 effectively.
* Manage liquidity across
 **CEX and DEX environments (including AMMs)** 
 , optimising execution in both off\-chain and on\-chain markets.
* Oversee integration with
 **custodial providers (e.g. Fireblocks)** 
 , addressing latency, settlement, and operational coordination.
* Drive
 **end\-to\-end latency optimisation** 
 across order routing, signing, and on\-chain settlement.
* Maintain
 **tight spreads and consistent market depth across venues** 
 , managing fragmented liquidity and multi\-exchange listings.



**Token Strategy \& Exchange Engagement** 



* Lead token trading and liquidity strategy, including managing simultaneous listings across multiple Tier 1 CEXs, coordinating with exchange listing teams, meeting liquidity requirements, and managing launch windows and post\-listing market support.
* Manage cross\-exchange price consistency, arbitrage mitigation, and unified order book strategy to minimise price discrepancies and adverse arbitrage pressure when the token is live on multiple venues.
* Work closely with relevant stakeholders on exchange relationships, listing processes, and ongoing liquidity support across key venues.
* Ensure token and exchange strategy are underpinned by strong compliance awareness, including wash trading monitoring, market manipulation prevention, and adherence to exchange\-specific listing rules and regulatory requirements.



**Spot Platform \& Exchange Infrastructure** 



* Oversee spot trading pair selection, curation, and lifecycle management on the platform, ensuring pairs are commercially viable and supported by adequate liquidity.
* Bring hands\-on experience with
 **matching engine architecture, order book design, and trade settlement workflows** 
 , working with technology teams to deliver best\-in\-class execution and liquidity on the platform.
* Optimise on\-platform settlement processes and ensure seamless integration between the matching engine, custodial layer, and external liquidity sources.



**Risk, Governance \& Infrastructure** 



* Own risk management across trading books, liquidity operations, token\-related exposure, and counterparty activity.
* Build robust controls around inventory, hedging, funding, execution, liquidity, and operational escalation.
* Partner with technology teams on execution tools, APIs, pricing systems, automation, and trading infrastructure.
* Ensure that trading activity operates within a strong governance and compliance framework suitable for a serious and growing platform.



**Cross\-functional Leadership** 



* Work closely with Product, Technology, Risk, Compliance, Operations, and senior management to align trading strategy with business objectives.
* Act as the senior internal owner for all matters related to trading logic, liquidity architecture, market structure, and execution design.
* Support decisions that sit across commercial strategy and trading reality, ensuring the platform is built in a way that is both scalable and market\-relevant.



**Reporting \& Senior Management Communication** 



* Establish and maintain
 **structured reporting frameworks** 
 covering trading performance, P\&L, risk exposure, liquidity metrics, and market conditions, ensuring senior management has full visibility at all times.
* Deliver regular dashboards, commentary, and strategic updates to the executive team, translating complex trading dynamics into clear, actionable insights.
* Proactively escalate material risks, market events, or operational issues with clear recommendations and proposed action plans.



**Team Building \& Management** 



* Build, lead, and mentor a high\-calibre trading team and supporting trading operations capability.
* Create a culture of accountability, speed, analytical rigour, and disciplined execution.
* Strengthen the function in a way that supports scale without compromising control, performance, or market edge.'



  





**Candidate Profile:** 



* 7\+ years of experience in crypto trading, derivatives, OTC, liquidity management, or market making.
* Proven track record of building or leading a crypto trading function within a structured or institutional environment.
* Strong expertise in derivatives trading, including perpetuals, funding, hedging, pricing, and risk management.
* Solid experience in OTC execution, liquidity sourcing, market making, and cross\-venue trading strategies.
* Deep understanding of market structure, liquidity dynamics, exchange microstructure, and client flow behaviour.
* Experience working with tier\-1 crypto exchanges, liquidity providers, and token\-related trading environments (including listings or post\-launch support).
* Good command of quantitative or systematic trading concepts, with the ability to collaborate with technical teams.
* Hands\-on experience with DEXs (e.g. Uniswap), custodial platforms (e.g. Fireblocks), and hybrid CEX/DEX environments, including latency and settlement considerations.
* Familiarity with trading infrastructure, including matching engines, order books, and execution systems.
* Proven ability to manage fragmented liquidity, cross\-exchange pricing, and arbitrage dynamics.
* Strong leadership, judgment, and crisis management skills in high\-pressure market conditions.



  





**Preferred Background:** 



* Experience within a crypto exchange, market maker, liquidity provider, prop trading firm, or institutional digital asset platform.
* Exposure to both centralised and decentralised trading environments.
* Experience supporting token listings, launches, or liquidity programmes.
* Familiarity with trading infrastructure, including pricing systems, funding mechanisms, and execution frameworks.
* Experience operating in institutional or regulated environments with strong governance and controls.
* Proven ability to manage external partners and counterparties, including exchanges, custodians, and liquidity providers.
* Understanding of exchange requirements, market\-making obligations, and multi\-jurisdictional considerations.

data.jd_text:
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) \& General Manager Mudir Amali P A** 




**Company Overview** 




 Mudir Amali ("PA") is a pioneering technology start\-up based in Doha, Qatar. We offer a smart personal\-assistant platform that combines advanced artificial intelligence with a network of trained human delegates to manage customers’ day\-to\-day tasks.
 



  





 Users interact with our service through natural\-language chat (via our App) and can request anything from document delivery and food \& coffee delivery to rides, shopping, luggage/cargo delivery, medicine delivery, security \& safety equipment, flowers \& chocolate, and other errands.
 



  





 The platform integrates modern AI to understand requests, assigns a real assistant to execute the task, and provides real\-time order tracking and fast execution.
 



  





 Our vision is to be the first choice for daily personal assistance, enabling users to reclaim their time and focus on what matters. Our mission is to connect users with reliable human assistants who provide diverse services and fast delivery to improve quality of life.
 



  





 Mudir Amali offers:
 


* 24/7 technical support
* Secure payment options (Visa, MasterCard, Apple Pay, bank transfer)
* Flexible subscription packages with discounts and VIP support



  





 We serve all major areas in Qatar, including Doha, Al Rayyan, Al Wakrah, Lusail, and The Pearl, and have tens of thousands of active users and 150\+ partners.
 



 🌐 https://www.mudiramali\-pa.com
 



  





  





**Role Summary** 




 We are seeking a
 **Chief Executive Officer (CEO) \& General Manager** 
 to lead Mudir Amali into its next phase of growth.
 



 The CEO will report to the board of directors and will have full P\&L responsibility. This role will shape strategy, oversee operations, lead product execution, manage AI\-driven systems and human operations, and drive expansion beyond Qatar.
 



  





 We are looking for a visionary leader with strong operational excellence, entrepreneurial mindset, and deep understanding of scaling technology\-enabled services in the Middle East.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Strategic Leadership** 



* Develop and execute long\-term strategy aligned with company vision
* Identify new markets, partnerships, and revenue streams
* Lead expansion across GCC and beyond
* Leverage AI insights and data for strategic decision\-making



**Operational Management** 



* Oversee daily operations of the AI\-powered platform
* Ensure fast execution, real\-time tracking, and high service quality
* Lead cross\-functional teams (product, engineering, logistics, support, marketing)
* Manage and optimize the human assistant network



**Technology \& Innovation** 



* Drive innovation in AI, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and automation
* Adopt emerging technologies (AI, predictive analytics, etc.)
* Ensure strong data security and compliance



**Financial \& Administrative Leadership** 



* Manage budgets, forecasts, and financial performance
* Optimize pricing and subscription strategies
* Lead fundraising, investor relations, and board reporting



**Partnerships \& Stakeholders** 



* Build relationships with corporate clients and government entities
* Expand B2B services and recurring operations
* Represent the company publicly and strategically



  





  





**Candidate Qualifications** 



* **Experience:** 
 15\+ years in executive leadership, operations, or general management
* **Tech Exposure:** 
 Experience with AI\-driven products, apps, or tech platforms
* **Operational Strength:** 
 Proven ability to scale operations across multiple services
* **Leadership:** 
 Strong track record building high\-performing teams
* **Strategy:** 
 Experience in market expansion and partnerships
* **Finance:** 
 Strong financial and analytical capabilities
* **Communication:** 
 Fluent Arabic \& English (Arabic is a MUST)
* **Education:** 
 Bachelor’s required; MBA preferred



  





  





**Benefits \& Opportunities** 



* Lead a
 **high\-impact, mission\-driven company**
* Work on
 **cutting\-edge AI and digital assistant technology**
* Scale a platform with
 **strong traction in the Middle East**
* Competitive compensation \+ incentives \+ potential equity
* Fast\-paced, creative, and ambitious environment



  





  





**How to Apply** 




 Apply directly on LinkedIn.
 



 Qualified candidates will be contacted.
 



  





 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
 



  





**فرصة عمل: الرئيس التنفيذي (CEO) والمدير العام – مدير أعمالي P A** 




**نبذة عن الشركة** 




 شركة
 **مدير أعمالي (PA)** 
 هي شركة تقنية ناشئة رائدة مقرها الدوحة، قطر. نقدم منصة مساعد شخصي ذكية تجمع بين
 **الذكاء الاصطناعي المتقدم** 
 وشبكة من المساعدين البشريين لتنفيذ المهام اليومية للعملاء.
 



 يمكن للمستخدمين التفاعل معنا عبر التطبيق أو واتساب باستخدام اللغة الطبيعية، وطلب خدمات مثل:
 



 توصيل المستندات، توصيل الطعام والقهوة، المشاوير، التسوق، نقل الأغراض، توصيل الأدوية، معدات السلامة، الهدايا، وغيرها من المهام اليومية.
 



  





 تعتمد المنصة على الذكاء الاصطناعي لفهم الطلبات، ثم تعيين مساعد حقيقي لتنفيذها، مع تتبع مباشر وسرعة في التنفيذ.
 



 رؤيتنا أن نكون الخيار الأول للمساعدة الشخصية اليومية، ونمكن المستخدمين من استعادة وقتهم والتركيز على ما يهمهم.
 



 مهمتنا هي ربط المستخدمين بمساعدين موثوقين يقدمون خدمات متنوعة بسرعة وكفاءة.
 



 نقدم:
 


* دعم فني 24/7
* وسائل دفع آمنة (بطاقات، Apple Pay، تحويل بنكي)
* اشتراكات مرنة مع مزايا VIP



 نغطي جميع مناطق قطر ولدينا عشرات الآلاف من المستخدمين وأكثر من 150 شريك.
 



 🌐 https://www.mudiramali\-pa.com
 



  





  





  





**ملخص الدور** 




 نبحث عن
 **رئيس تنفيذي (CEO) ومدير عام** 
 لقيادة الشركة في مرحلة النمو القادمة.
 



 سيكون المسؤول عن:
 


* وضع الاستراتيجية
* إدارة العمليات اليومية
* قيادة تطوير المنتج
* إدارة الأنظمة المعتمدة على الذكاء الاصطناعي
* التوسع داخل وخارج قطر



 نبحث عن قائد صاحب رؤية، يجمع بين الخبرة التشغيلية والعقلية الريادية.
 



  





  





**المسؤوليات الرئيسية** 




**القيادة الاستراتيجية** 



* وضع وتنفيذ استراتيجية طويلة المدى
* استكشاف أسواق وفرص جديدة
* قيادة التوسع في الخليج والمنطقة
* استخدام بيانات الذكاء الاصطناعي في اتخاذ القرار



**الإدارة التشغيلية** 



* إدارة العمليات اليومية للمنصة
* ضمان سرعة التنفيذ وجودة الخدمة
* قيادة الفرق المختلفة
* إدارة شبكة المساعدين



**التقنية والابتكار** 



* تطوير استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي والتقنيات الحديثة
* تبني تقنيات جديدة لتحسين الأداء
* ضمان أمن البيانات والامتثال



**الإدارة المالية** 



* إدارة الميزانيات والتكاليف
* تطوير استراتيجيات التسعير والاشتراكات
* إدارة المستثمرين وجمع التمويل



**الشراكات** 



* بناء علاقات مع الشركات والجهات الحكومية
* تطوير خدمات B2B
* تمثيل الشركة أمام الشركاء والإعلام



  





  





**المؤهلات المطلوبة** 



* خبرة لا تقل عن
 **15 سنة** 
 في الإدارة أو القيادة التنفيذية
* خبرة في تطبيقات تقنية أو منتجات تعتمد على الذكاء الاصطناعي
* قدرة عالية على إدارة العمليات وتوسيعها
* مهارات قيادية قوية
* خبرة في التوسع وبناء الشراكات
* مهارات مالية وتحليلية ممتازة
* إتقان اللغة العربية واللغة الإنجليزية (اللغة العربية إلزامية)
* بكالوريوس كحد أدنى، ويفضل MBA



  





  





**المزايا** 



* قيادة شركة ذات تأثير حقيقي
* العمل على تقنيات حديثة ومتقدمة
* فرصة للنمو والتوسع في السوق
* راتب تنافسي \+ حوافز \+ إمكانية أسهم
* بيئة عمل سريعة ومبتكرة



  





  





**طريقة التقديم** 




 التقديم مباشرة عبر موقع LinkedIn
 



 سيتم التواصل مع المرشحين المؤهلين.

data.jd_text:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
****Title And Summary****
 Senior Vice President, Government Engagement, EEMEA
   

  

 Location is flexible but must be in region.
   

  

**Overview**
 Mastercard is dedicated to promoting inclusive growth and financial inclusion. The mandate of the Regional Government Engagement unit is to build durable, trusted relationships with key government agencies to accelerate their transition to a cashless ecosystem though digitalization, while increasing revenues and seeding new markets for Mastercard. We drive relevance and revenues in the government space by developing effective regional go to market programs supported by clear priorities, success metrics and incentives. We provide expert sales support to both country managers and local sales resources through a solid client engagement playbook approach. We guide the transition from reactive solutions sales to strategic government engagement programs. And we ensure alignment between regional demand and our global solutions.
   

  

* The Regional Government Engagement Senior Vice President role focuses on aligning Mastercard’s


 product, service and ecosystem capabilities to solve for the challenges government client face today in the areas of financial inclusion, citizen service efficiency, inclusive economic growth and government operational excellence. We do this by engaging, listening and leading. Our regional team is comprised of industry leaders, relationship builders and deal closers. We apply Mastercard’s digital tools, business insights, last mile solutions and market organizing skills to support client success. We also have a passion for learning, exploring new capabilities, and applying the best methodologies and insights to the government business.
   

  

* This role is at the heart of our intent to scale our business across all regions to drive revenue, market


 relevance and social impact. The unit is regionally deployed and focuses on a select number of priority
   

  

 markets, segments and clients, directly agreed with the senior leadership in the region.
   

  

* The Regional Government Engagement SVP is accountable for:
* The development of the regional government vision, strategy and execution program including a list of prioritized markets, clients and solution opportunities.
* Identify and pursue opportunities in digitizing big government flows, transformational infrastructure partnerships, major transit and tourism initiatives
* The acceleration of Mastercard’s revenue performance in the region, through a structured and diligent sales excellence approach.
* The effective management of a growing team of senior government specialists across target markets, in a peer alignment to the Divisional Presidents.
* The effective representation of the Government Engagement business opportunity within the region’s senior management team, as well as the negotiation of the related revenue and relevance objectives with other members of the management team.
* The alignment of global, regional and local resources to drive execution, in close coordination with the Region’s President, the Divisional Presidents, the regional product and service units and the Mastercard Strategic Growth management team.
* Direct engagement on key government opportunities, at the top civil servant and political government executive level, developing the business opportunities across the region, assisting country managers and helping win strategic deals.
* Capacity building at the markets level by training sales on relevant Mastercard solutions, narrative and client references.
* The establishment and management of a regional community of practice to cross\-fertilize regional and global best practices.
* This position reports directly to EVP, Market Development \- EEMEA with a dotted line reporting relationship into the Global Lead, Public Sector Center of Excellence. Location is flexible but must be in region.


 Role
   

  

* Primary accountability for development and execution of the regional government strategy, starting


**From:**
* Develop a deep understanding of regional, national and local priorities.
* Engaging region and division leadership in a peer fashion to prioritize clients and solution opportunities. Negotiate and secure local support of resources, aligning them to execution.
* Securing global and regional resources to execute on the plan and drive marquee wins. Build a region\-wide Government Engagement extended steering committee including peers in the Public Policy, Legal, Services, Consumer and commercial products, O\&T and Delivery units.
* Lead a team of segment experts, helping them growing in their roles by active coaching and talent planning
* Accelerate solutions deployment by providing regional trainings to own team and other in market units, provide expert sales support for marquee engagements.
* Liaison with the peers across the five global regions of MA and the Global PS team to represent EEMEA and draw on expertise and market development support
* Personally initiate and drive marquee, commercial deals.
* Represent the Region within Strategic Growth’s management team. Drive strategic alignment with global units.
* Build and curate the regional community of practice. Mobilize the team to act as first line of support for regional \& divisional presidents for thought leadership and strategic engagements.


**All About You**
* Experience working for or closely with government agencies, managing process improvement and


 transformative change initiatives, as well as proven experience in engaging very senior government
   

  

 leaders to build durable relations.
   

  

* Proven track in leading and closing large and complex government deals in the region.
* Consultative selling focused, with deep product, services, and solutions expertise and hands\-on approach
* Adept at interacting with senior Mastercard stakeholders – in terms of engagement, communication and transparency of purpose. Can skillfully lead complex regional initiatives that require collaboration across functional, geographical and cultural lines.
* Demonstrated ability to work across divisional boundaries, within the region, acting as peer to other senior leaders.
* Self\-motivated, thrives in a fast\-paced environment; readiness to take\-on stretch goals.
* Strong gravitas, exceptional relationship management, influencing and communication skills.
* Undergraduate degree required. MBA or graduate degree preferred.
* Open to travel across the region and globally
* English fluency is required. At least one other regional language a strong plus.


 Corporate Security Responsibility
   

  

 Every Person Working For, Or On Behalf Of, Mastercard Is Responsible For Information Security. All Activities Involving Access To Mastercard Assets, Information, And Networks Comes With An Inherent Risk To The Organization And Therefore, It Is Expected That The Successful Candidate For This Position Must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices.
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed.
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security training in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All Activities Involving Access To Mastercard Assets, Information, And Networks Comes With An Inherent Risk To The Organization And, Therefore, It Is Expected That Every Person Working For, Or On Behalf Of, Mastercard Is Responsible For Information Security And Must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;

data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
 Avani\+ Palm View Dubai Hotel \& Suites is a stylish urban resort located at the entrance of Palm Jumeirah, offering easy access to Dubai Media City, Dubai Marina, and transport links such as the Dubai Tram and Palm Monorail. The property features 247 spacious studios and apartments, each equipped with kitchens and laundry facilities, making it ideal for families and long stays. Guests can enjoy an infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Gulf, a fully equipped AvaniFit gym, versatile meeting facilities, and dining options including Seven Seeds, The Pantry, and Aqua pool bar.
   

  

 La Suite Dubai Hotel \& Apartments, situated along Sheikh Zayed Road within Sidra Tower, caters perfectly to both business and leisure travelers with its prime location near Media and Internet City. The property offers 265 rooms, apartments, and penthouses across the upper floors, many with balconies and sweeping views of the city and coastline. Facilities include two outdoor pools, a 24/7 gym with yoga room, a luxurious spa, tennis court, and dining venues such as Aqua Café and Serai Lounge. With flexible meeting spaces for up to 200 guests and convenient shuttle services, La Suite combines modern living with resort\-style amenities in the heart of Dubai.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Cluster Director of Revenue is responsible for leading the revenue strategy for multiple hotels based in Dubai. This role oversees all revenue\-generating functions—including pricing, forecasting, distribution, market analysis, and demand optimization—to maximize total revenue and profitability across both properties. The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker with deep analytical expertise, strong commercial acumen, and proven success in luxury or upscale hospitality markets.
   

  

* Develop and implement revenue strategies that optimize RevPAR, GOPPAR, and total hotel revenue across both properties.
* Create accurate short\-term and long\-term forecasts for rooms, F\&B, and ancillary revenue streams.
* Conduct weekly and monthly performance reviews, adjusting strategies in response to market conditions.
* Lead revenue meetings with property leadership, presenting insights and actionable recommendations.
* Monitor local, regional, and global market trends, including competitor pricing, demand shifts, and travel patterns.
* Conduct segmentation and channel mix analysis to evaluate revenue opportunities.
* Identify emerging demand periods, group displacement impacts, and business opportunities.
* Develop dynamic pricing strategies to maximize occupancy, ADR, and total yield.
* Ensure optimal inventory management across all distribution channels (direct, OTA, GDS, corporate, wholesale).
* Oversee rate loading, parity, and system accuracy across both properties.
* Evaluate and approve group and corporate rate proposals, RFPs, and long\-stay opportunities.
* Maintain optimal visibility, competitiveness, and positioning across all online and offline channels.
* Collaborate with digital marketing and e\-commerce teams to enhance conversion, website performance, and digital demand generation.
* Monitor OTA performance, commission costs, and distribution efficiency.
* Lead, mentor, and develop the cluster revenue team, ensuring high performance and productivity.
* Work closely with Sales, Marketing, Reservations, and Operations to drive alignment with the overall commercial strategy.
* Provide training and tools to ensure cross\-departmental understanding of revenue management principles.
* Oversee property RMS, PMS, CRS, channel manager, and related revenue systems.
* Ensure data accuracy and integrity across all systems.
* Produce weekly, monthly, and ad\-hoc reports to support executive decision\-making.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in hospitality, Business, Finance, or related field; Master’s degree preferred.

**Company Description**
 Avani\+ Palm View Dubai Hotel \& Suites is a stylish urban resort located at the entrance of Palm Jumeirah, offering easy access to Dubai Media City, Dubai Marina, and transport links such as the Dubai Tram and Palm Monorail. The property features 247 spacious studios and apartments, each equipped with kitchens and laundry facilities, making it ideal for families and long stays. Guests can enjoy an infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Gulf, a fully equipped AvaniFit gym, versatile meeting facilities, and dining options including Seven Seeds, The Pantry, and Aqua pool bar.
   

  

 La Suite Dubai Hotel \& Apartments, situated along Sheikh Zayed Road within Sidra Tower, caters perfectly to both business and leisure travelers with its prime location near Media and Internet City. The property offers 265 rooms, apartments, and penthouses across the upper floors, many with balconies and sweeping views of the city and coastline. Facilities include two outdoor pools, a 24/7 gym with yoga room, a luxurious spa, tennis court, and dining venues such as Aqua Café and Serai Lounge. With flexible meeting spaces for up to 200 guests and convenient shuttle services, La Suite combines modern living with resort\-style amenities in the heart of Dubai.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Cluster Director of Revenue is responsible for leading the revenue strategy for multiple hotels based in Dubai. This role oversees all revenue\-generating functions—including pricing, forecasting, distribution, market analysis, and demand optimization—to maximize total revenue and profitability across both properties. The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker with deep analytical expertise, strong commercial acumen, and proven success in luxury or upscale hospitality markets.
   

  

* Develop and implement revenue strategies that optimize RevPAR, GOPPAR, and total hotel revenue across both properties.
* Create accurate short\-term and long\-term forecasts for rooms, F\&B, and ancillary revenue streams.
* Conduct weekly and monthly performance reviews, adjusting strategies in response to market conditions.
* Lead revenue meetings with property leadership, presenting insights and actionable recommendations.
* Monitor local, regional, and global market trends, including competitor pricing, demand shifts, and travel patterns.
* Conduct segmentation and channel mix analysis to evaluate revenue opportunities.
* Identify emerging demand periods, group displacement impacts, and business opportunities.
* Develop dynamic pricing strategies to maximize occupancy, ADR, and total yield.
* Ensure optimal inventory management across all distribution channels (direct, OTA, GDS, corporate, wholesale).
* Oversee rate loading, parity, and system accuracy across both properties.
* Evaluate and approve group and corporate rate proposals, RFPs, and long\-stay opportunities.
* Maintain optimal visibility, competitiveness, and positioning across all online and offline channels.
* Collaborate with digital marketing and e\-commerce teams to enhance conversion, website performance, and digital demand generation.
* Monitor OTA performance, commission costs, and distribution efficiency.
* Lead, mentor, and develop the cluster revenue team, ensuring high performance and productivity.
* Work closely with Sales, Marketing, Reservations, and Operations to drive alignment with the overall commercial strategy.
* Provide training and tools to ensure cross\-departmental understanding of revenue management principles.
* Oversee property RMS, PMS, CRS, channel manager, and related revenue systems.
* Ensure data accuracy and integrity across all systems.
* Produce weekly, monthly, and ad\-hoc reports to support executive decision\-making.


 Qualifications
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in hospitality, Business, Finance, or related field; Master’s degree preferred.
* Minimum 3\-5 years revenue management experience in upscale or luxury hotels; cluster or multi\-property experience required.
* Strong command of RMS, PMS, CRS, channel management systems; expertise with STR, Rate360, and BI tools.
* Excellent analytical, numerical, and commercial decision\-making skills.
* Strong communication, leadership, and stakeholder\-management abilities.
* Knowledge of the Dubai hospitality market and GCC travel dynamics is highly preferred.

Remote collaboration and global client engagement are core aspects of this position, with opportunities to influence organizational growth and market reputation.
   

  

 Accountabilities

* Deep expertise in Google Ads and LinkedIn Ads, with strong working knowledge of Meta Ads.
* Solid understanding of pipeline management, attribution, and revenue reporting.
* Experience collaborating with Sales, Revenue Operations, and Marketing leadership.

data.jd_text:
**Position: Associate Creative Director \- Exhibitions** 




 Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
 



  





 WHO IS DXB LIVE?
 



  





 DXB LIVE is the Experiential Marketing and Event Services Agency of Dubai World Trade Centre, a full\-spectrum powerhouse for event management, production and delivery. With creative vision, technical excellence and operational precision, DXB LIVE brings to life a wide range of world\-class events, from exhibitions and conferences to national celebrations, international festivals, immersive brand activations and exclusive, high\-end weddings.
 



  





 Our in\-house capabilities span design, build, technology and logistics allowing us to execute at scale and deliver exceptional experiences across every format. As we expand our global footprint, we continue to forge strong alliances with leading international event organizations, positioning DXB LIVE among the world’s premier event service providers.
 



  





 EMPOWERING PEOPLE, INSPIRING TALENT: TOGETHER, WE MAKE
 **AMAZING** 
 HAPPEN!
 



  





 WHAT’S THE ROLE?
 



  





 We are seeking a highly experienced Associate Creative Director – Exhibitions (ACD) to join DXB LIVE and lead the creative vision for our exhibition design projects. You will work closely with the Creative Director and AVP – Creative Design, taking ownership of the creative vision, concept development and delivery of exhibition projects that align with client objectives and DXB LIVE’s strategic creative direction.
 



  





 In this role, you will lead by example setting creative standards, challenging thinking and fostering a culture of innovation and excellence. You will manage multiple projects simultaneously, stay ahead of global exhibition design trends and contribute to shaping the future direction of DXB LIVE’s exhibition design capabilities.
 



  





 WHAT DOES THE ROLE INVOLVE?
 



  




* Lead the creative output for assigned exhibition projects, ensuring proposals are high\-quality, on brief and aligned with the overall creative strategy. The creative narrative, storytelling and experiential journey are equally important as structure and form.
* Support the Creative Director (CD), AVP – Creative Design and the DXB LIVE Creative Design Studio across all business opportunities in exhibitions.
* Collaborate with the CD, AVP – Creative Design, Creative Strategist, senior commercial and client development teams, designers and freelancers to fully understand briefs, target audiences and creative direction.
* Guide, mentor and inspire the design team, emphasizing the importance of their contributions to each project.
* Facilitate effective teamwork through creative brainstorming sessions and collaborative concept development.
* Develop project timeframes in coordination with the Traffic Controller and CD, ensuring sufficient time for high\-quality delivery.
* Introduce design trends, standards and changes to the studio, supporting continuous improvement.
* Conduct research on international and MENA\-region design trends, techniques, and innovations in graphics, structures, environmental and experiential design.
* Stay updated on digital, technology and experiential activation trends to enhance exhibition concepts.
* Attend events and activities that inspire creativity and broaden design perspectives.
* Monitor and report on research and development outcomes, recommending best practices and areas for studio growth.
* Assist in identifying team gaps and contribute to the long\-term development and evolution of the design studio.
* Undertake other duties as required by the CD/AVP – Creative Design, while handling confidential information with discretion and professionalism.



  





 WHAT DO WE OFFER?
 



  




* A senior creative leadership role within one of the region’s most dynamic experiential and exhibitions organisations.
* Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
* Exposure to high‑profile, large‑scale international exhibitions and landmark events.
* Opportunities for professional growth within a collaborative, innovation‑driven creative environment.



  





 WHAT YOU NEED:
 



  




* Bachelor’s degree in Design or a related discipline.
* Minimum of 10 years’ experience in a creative agency environment, with proven excellence in exhibition stand Design or experiential design.
* Strong leadership skills, with experience managing and mentoring a creative team.
* Highly creative, organized, and detail\-oriented, with excellent time management.
* Exceptional professionalism and strong verbal, written, listening, and public speaking skills.
* Relevant work experience in the GCC region is required.
* Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite is essential; knowledge of 3ds Max or other 3D software is an advantage.



  





**Disclaimer** 




  





 The duties and responsibilities described are not a comprehensive list and may change, or additional tasks within the scope of work may be assigned at any time with or without prior notice, as necessitated by business demands.

data.jd_text:
Harness is the AI Software Delivery Platform company, led by technologist and entrepreneur Jyoti Bansal (founder of AppDynamics, acquired by Cisco for $3\.7B). Harness has raised approximately $570M in funding and is valued at $5\.5B, backed by leading investors including Goldman Sachs, Menlo Ventures, IVP, Unusual Ventures, Citi Ventures, and more. As AI accelerates code creation, the real bottleneck has shifted to everything after the code – testing, deployments, application security, reliability, compliance, and cost optimization. Harness brings AI and automation to this “outer loop,” helping teams ship software faster while maintaining security and governance throughout the entire software delivery lifecycle.
   

  

 Powered by Harness AI and the Software Delivery Knowledge Graph, the Harness Platform applies deep context and intelligent automation across the software delivery lifecycle with governance and policy\-driven controls embedded throughout the platform.
   

  

 Over the past year, Harness powered over 185M deployments, 82M builds, 18T flag evaluations, 8M security scans, 9\.1B optimized tests, 3T protected API calls, and helped manage $2\.8B in cloud spend — enabling customers like United Airlines, Morningstar, and Choice Hotels to accelerate releases by up to 75%, reduce cloud costs by up to 60%, and achieve 10x DevOps efficiency.
   

  

 With a global team across 14 offices and 25 countries, Harness is shaping the future of AI software delivery — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to help us move even faster.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 The Regional Vice President is a front line sales leader who will leads a team of Enterprise Account Executives. This role will be responsible for running a regional plan, building out the territory, developing Enterprise Account Executives within the region, while implementing a strong sales methodology, working complex enterprise sales cycles, while focused on the Harness software and services.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Meet or exceed monthly, quarterly and yearly revenue targets
* Develop and execute a comprehensive regional plan
* Accelerate customer adoption
* Continually build and grow a robust sales pipeline
* Work with partners to extend reach \& drive adoption
* Lead contract negotiations
* Develop long\-term strategic relationships with key accounts
* Ensure customer happiness and success
* Help to recruit and build west sales team
* Travel throughout predominantly the Middle East but occasionally across Europe and North America.


**About You**
* At least 3 years formal sales leadership experience building and leading high performance sales teams.
* High career trajectory and potential.
* Someone with experience in a start\-up environment.
* Consistent overachievement in previous roles.
* Significant enterprise sales and strategic customer development experience.
* Experience practicing and implementing a sales methodology, such as MEDDIC.
* Track record in closing large, complex deals across verticals in the Fortune 500\.
* History of accurate forecasting and business reporting.
* Experience in working with Salesforce and other sales oriented tracking tools.


**What You Will Have At Harness**
* Competitive salary
* Flexible work schedule
* Paid Time Off and Parental Leave
* Monthly, quarterly, and annual social and team building events
* Quarterly Harness TGIF\-Off / 4 days


**Work Location**
* This is a hybrid role, based in our Dubai, UAE offer.


**Harness In The News**
* Accelerating Our Mission to Bring AI to Everything After Code
* Goldman Sachs leads investment in software delivery startup Harness at $5\.5 billion valuation
* How Harness runs 16 “startups within a startup” at scale \| Jyoti Bansal
* Harness Research Shows AI Visibility Crisis Fueling Security Nightmare
* Harness has been named to the Inc. Power Partner list for software delivery success


 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex or national origin.
   

  

**Note on Fraudulent Recruiting/Offers**
 We have become aware that there may be fraudulent recruiting attempts being made by people posing as representatives of Harness. These scams may involve fake job postings, unsolicited emails, or messages claiming to be from our recruiters or hiring managers.
   

  

 Please note, we do not ask for sensitive or financial information via chat, text, or social media, and any email communications will come from the domain @harness.io. Additionally, Harness will never ask for any payment, fee to be paid, or purchases to be made by a job applicant. All applicants are encouraged to apply directly to our open jobs via our website. Interviews are generally conducted via Zoom video conference unless the candidate requests other accommodations.
   

  

 If you believe that you have been the target of an interview/offer scam by someone posing as a representative of Harness, please do not provide any personal or financial information and contact us immediately at security@harness.io. You can also find additional information about this type of scam and report any fraudulent employment offers via the Federal Trade Commission’s website (https://consumer.ftc.gov/articles/job\-scams), or you can contact your local law enforcement agency.

* Manage the components of the 3–5\-year healthcare ambition to ensure internal alignment and upward reporting to Executive reviews.
* Coordinate with all the in\-country marketing and commercial teams to drive the growth across the region.



  





**Qualifications Required:** 



* Bachelor's or equivalent 3\-year degree (NQF Level 7\).



  





**Experience and Skills Required:** 



* Have a minimum of 20 years’ experience within Pharma, Healthcare, sales, marketing, distribution, or supply chain industry.
* More than 10 years BD \& Commercial experience across multiple capabilities and with a proven success of selling integrated end to end solutions.
* Exposure to and working knowledge of all facets of contractual requirements
* Successful MD Experience in Healthcare in Africa is a distinct advantage from a credibility perspective.



  





**About DP World** 




 Trade is the lifeblood of the global economy, creating opportunities and improving the quality of life for people around the world. DP World exists to make the world’s trade flow better, changing what’s possible for the customers and communities we serve globally.
 



  





 With a dedicated, diverse and professional team of more than 111,000 employees from 159 nationalities, spanning 77 countries on six continents, DP World is pushing trade further and faster towards a seamless supply chain that’s fit for the future.
 



  





 We’re rapidly transforming and integrating our businesses \-\- Ports and Terminals, Marine Services, Logistics and Technology – and uniting our global infrastructure with local expertise to create stronger, more efficient end\-to\-end supply chain solutions that can change the way the world trades.
 



  





 What's more, we're reshaping the future by investing in innovation. From intelligent delivery systems to automated warehouse stacking, we’re at the cutting edge of disruptive technology, pushing the sector towards better ways to trade, minimising disruptions from the factory floor to the customer’s door.
 



  





 DP World is on a mission to transcend boundaries and bridge the gap between all nations and cultures – not just in what we do but also in how we behave.
 



  





 We are dedicated to creating a culture where everyone feels respected, supported, and empowered to reach their full potential. We believe that embracing inclusion and diversity, drives innovation and growth and helps us connect people, businesses, and societies. Free minds and different perspectives are changing our world, and together we can change what’s possible.
 



  





 WE MAKE TRADE FLOW TO CHANGE WHAT'S POSSIBLE FOR EVERYONE.
 



  





**EEO Statement** 




*DP World is committed to the principles of Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO). We strongly believe that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success and we make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, gender, disability, race, religion, or belief.* 




  





*By submitting your resume and application information, you authorize DP World to transmit and store your information in the world\-wide recruitment database, and to circulate that information as necessary for the purpose of evaluating your qualifications for this or other job vacancies.*
