data.jd_text:
We are looking for
 **a Senior Test Delivery Manager / Test Program Director** 
 to lead the quality engineering and testing delivery for a large\-scale telecom transformation program. The role requires strong leadership in managing complex testing portfolios, large, distributed teams, and multi\-vendor ecosystems, while ensuring delivery excellence and financial discipline.
   

  

 The leader will be responsible for end\-to\-end test strategy, delivery governance, demand management, and resource optimization, while driving AI\-first quality engineering practices to improve productivity, predictability, and business outcomes.
   

  

 This role will work closely with client leadership, program directors, architecture teams, and delivery partners to ensure quality objectives are achieved across all releases in the transformation program.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Test Program Leadership**
* Own and drive the overall testing strategy and execution for a large telecom transformation program.
* Lead testing across multiple transformation workstreams.
* Establish quality governance frameworks aligned with program milestones and release plans.
* Manage large, distributed testing teams and multiple vendor partners.
* Ensure testing delivery meets fixed bid contractual commitments related to scope, cost, timelines, and quality.
* Drive cost optimization, productivity improvement, and margin protection through automation and AI\-led efficiencies.
* Manage program\-level testing budgets, forecasting, and resource utilization.
* Establish strong governance for scope management, change control, and risk mitigation.


**Demand Management \& Resource Planning**
* Manage testing demand across multiple workstreams and releases in alignment with program priorities.
* Lead capacity planning, resource forecasting, and skill\-based allocation to ensure optimal utilization.
* Establish structured resource scheduling models aligned with release cycles and delivery milestones.
* Collaborate with leadership teams to address demand\-supply gaps, ramp\-up planning, and skill transformation initiatives.


**AI\-First Quality Engineering**
* Drive adoption of AI\-enabled testing across the testing lifecycle.
* Leverage AI agents and intelligent automation to accelerate testing cycles and improve quality.
* Define AI adoption roadmap for quality engineering within the program.
* Build a highly automated testing ecosystem across functional and non\-functional testing.
* Drive shift\-left and shift\-right quality practices to enable faster feedback loops.


**Stakeholder \& Client Engagement**
* Act as the primary QA leader interfacing with senior client stakeholders.
* Provide strategic guidance on quality engineering practices and transformation initiatives.
* Facilitate program\-level quality reviews, defect governance forums, and release readiness discussions.
* Provide executive dashboards and quality insights to program leadership.


**Risk \& Quality Management**
* Establish proactive mechanisms for risk identification, quality assurance, and defect prevention.
* Implement predictive quality metrics and analytics using AI\-based insights.
* Ensure strong governance for all testing lifecycle activities.


**Experience**
**Required Skills \& Experience**
* 18\+ years of experience in Quality Engineering and Testing
* 8\+ years managing large transformation programs
* Experience delivering complex telecom programs under fixed bid or outcome\-based models
* Proven leadership managing large, distributed QA teams (100\+ resources)
* Telecom Domain Expertise and AI \& Modern Testing experience
* Strong program governance and stakeholder management
* Experience managing multi\-vendor delivery environments
* Expertise in demand management, capacity planning, and workforce scheduling
* Proven ability to drive quality transformation initiatives
* Strong background in Agile delivery

data.jd_text:
**🚀 Welcome to Your Next Adventure!**
 The Director of Marketing Communication provides strategic leadership for Snoonu’s brand reputation, voice, and visibility across all external channels. This senior role is accountable for defining and executing a world\-class communication agenda that strengthens Snoonu’s position as Qatar’s leading super app and a regional technology innovator.
   

  

 As a member of the Marketing leadership team, the Director oversees PR, corporate communications, Social media, influencer strategy, and creative content production. They will act as Snoonu’s communication architect, ensuring every message—from mass\-market campaigns to executive speeches—reinforces the company’s vision and business objectives.
   

  

**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**
* Strategic Leadership
* Define the long\-term communication vision, ensuring alignment with Snoonu’s business strategy and brand ambitions.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to the team on communication priorities, risks, and opportunities.
* Shape Snoonu’s reputation as both a market leader in Qatar and a growing regional brand.
* Corporate \& Brand Communication
* Lead the integrated communication strategy, ensuring coherent and impactful storytelling across all consumer and corporate audiences.
* Guard Snoonu’s brand identity, voice, and tone across all touch points.
* Elevate Snoonu’s innovation, partnerships, and community contributions through proactive storytelling.
* Public Relations \& Reputation Management
* Build and leverage strong relationships with local, regional, and international media.
* Oversee high\-stakes communication moments—major launches, partnerships, crises, and leadership visibility.
* Drive Snoonu’s share of voice and ensure consistent, positive market positioning.
* Influencer \& Community Advocacy
* Architect Snoonu’s influencer and ambassador program is an extension of the brand voice.
* Ensure the influencer strategy is aligned with the corporate reputation and delivers a measurable ROI.
* Create scalable, innovative influencer activations that elevate Snoonu’s visibility and relevance.
* Creative Excellence
* Set the vision for creative and content output that is bold, innovative, and market\-leading.
* Ensure campaigns and brand assets are culturally resonant, globally benchmarked, and consistent.
* Partner with digital, vertical, and performance marketing to amplify communication impact.
* Social Media Leadership
* Define Snoonu’s social media strategy across Instagram, TikTok, X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Snapchat, Facebook, and emerging platforms.
* Ensure platforms deliver on both brand\-building and performance goals, with tailored content strategies per audience.
* Establish governance for tone of voice, posting cadence, and content quality.
* Oversee social listening, ensuring real\-time responses to market sentiment and competitive activity.
* Partner with Vertical and Performance Marketing to amplify campaigns through social channels.
* Governance \& Measurement
* Establish communication governance frameworks to safeguard brand reputation and streamline approvals.
* Define and own communication KPIs (share of voice, PR value, brand equity index, influencer ROI, engagement).
* Provide the leadership team with strategic insights on market sentiment, risks, and communication effectiveness.


**🧙‍♂️ The Magic You Bring:﻿**
* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or a related field; Master’s or MBA preferred.
* 7\+ years of progressive experience in corporate communications, PR, or brand marketing, with at least 3 years in a senior leadership role.
* Proven track record of building and protecting corporate reputation, managing high\-stakes communications, and driving positive media coverage.
* Strong expertise in integrated communications—PR, corporate, social media, influencer marketing, and content production.
* Experience leading large\-scale brand and corporate campaigns with measurable impact on awareness, engagement, and reputation.
* Demonstrated ability to navigate crisis communications with confidence and protect brand trust.
* Deep understanding of the Qatari and GCC markets, with the ability to localize global best practices to resonate with local audiences.
* Strong media relations acumen, with established relationships across local, regional, and international outlets.
* Excellent analytical skills with the ability to measure, report, and optimize communication performance (e.g., share of voice, PR value, influencer ROI).
* Strong leadership capabilities, with experience building and managing high\-performing communication teams.
* Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills; fluency in English required, Arabic is a plus.


**Inside Snoonu’s Universe**
 Snoonu is Qatar’s homegrown Super App, reinventing daily life with blazing\-fast delivery, ride\-hailing, and shopping \- all in one place. Powered by tech, driven by a global team, and obsessed with making life easier.
   

  

**The Dream We’re Chasing**
 To be the first Qatari Super App that propels the region and its community through innovation and technology. We envision a global expansion where what we do surpasses norms and limitations every time.
   

  

**The Quest We’re On**
 To radically transform how people live by leveraging technology to connect them with endless possibilities.
   

  

**Our Everyday Superpowers**
**👥 Be Customer Obsessed:** 
 “Focus on the customer and all else will follow.”
   

  

**💪 Act with Integrity:** 
 “We are honest, ethical, and trustworthy in everything we do.”
   

  

**🧪 Be Curious and Creative:** 
 “We constantly innovate and create solutions to bring a lasting positive impact.”
   

  

 🏅
 **Lead by Example and Take Ownership:** 
 “Be the change you want to see and take ownership.”
   

  

**🚀 Work Smart and Deliver Results:** 
 “You can do more by doing less, better, and faster.”
   

  

**👨‍💼 It's All About People:** 
 “Be a team player; together we are stronger.”
   

  

**Perks \& Worklife Magic At Snoonu**
**🌐 Global Vibes –** 
 Collaborate with a worldwide crew.
   

  

**🧠 Brain Boosters –** 
 Learning budgets, access to courses, and tools for your growth.
   

  

**🚒 Builder’s Playground –** 
 Own your tasks, own your path! We’re big on autonomy.
   

  

 🏝️
 **Flexible Time Off –** 
 We take recharging seriously. Generous leave and wellness policies.
   

  

**🛠️ Agile Everything –** 
 Scrum isn’t a buzzword here. It’s how we roll, from product to ops.
   

  

**Beyond the Code: Giving Back Matters**
 We don’t just build app. We’re committed to doing business sustainably and giving back to the community that fuels us. From eco\-conscious practices to CSR projects, we’re always finding ways to do better—and we invite you to be a part of that mission.
   

  

**Diversity Isn’t Just a Buzzword**
 At Snoonu, fairness and inclusion are the foundation of everything we do. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity workplace that welcomes people from every walk of life. Be bold. Be you. Thrive here.
   

  

**Let’s Build the Future Together**
 Apply now to join a tech team where your code sparks change, your voice is heard, and your growth is guaranteed. Let’s make some tech magic together.
   

  

 Stay in the loop—connect with us on LinkedIn!

data.jd_text:
**Who are we?**
 At Finastra, we are a dynamic global provider of open finance software solutions, dedicated to expanding access to financial services. Our innovative applications span Lending, Payments, Treasury and Capital Markets, and Universal Banking. Proudly serving over 8,000 customers, including 45 of the world's top 50 banks, we aim to boost financial inclusion for all. Join us and be part of a vibrant company that embraces diverse perspectives, and is committed to doing well by doing good.
   

  

**What will you contribute?**
**The Presales and Project Management Principal** 
 is responsible for ensuring that all projects within the portfolio are delivered on time, within the client's budget, and meet or exceed financial targets, including baseline margins. This role defines project objectives and oversees quality assurance throughout the project lifecycle. A key aspect of the role is to consistently foster strong client relationships and uphold Finastra’s reputation for excellence. Additionally, the Principal ensures that all presales proposals are submitted punctually and are aligned with budget expectations in coordination with Sales and the Client.
   

  

**Principal Project Manager** 
 is responsible for managing all aspects of Large to moderately complex projects for a defined segment of strategic initiatives from project definition and intake to transition to full operational support.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Your deliverables as a
 **Principal Project Manager** 
 will include, but are not limited to, the following
   

  

* Leads and drives the development of the project intake process including developing scope, schedule and cost
* Defines the goals and objectives of specific project and defines individual team member’s roles and responsibilities for the duration of the project
* Manages multiple mid to large scale projects ensuring that they will complete on time and within budget and that the solution aligns with/meets the business objective
* Manages the daily/weekly project team assignments and monitors progress against the work plan to assure that objectives are met within the prescribed time, cost, and quality measures
* Identification and impact analysis of potential project changes and facilitation of change control board to approve or disapprove said changes.
* Meets financial objectives by forecasting requirements; preparing a project budget; scheduling expenditures analyzing variances; initiating corrective actions
* Continual identification, qualification and tracking of risks, defining mitigation and contingency plans, assigning appropriate resources, and constantly communicating status
* Responsible for identification of resource requirements and proper communication of those requirements in a timely manner to ensure the project is properly staffed with the skilled resources required
* Responsible for identifying internal and external stakeholders, understanding their communication requirements and fulfilling those requirements


**Requirements And Qualifications**
* 15\+ years of end\-to\-end Project Management experience
* Fluent in Arabic; native\-level proficiency is highly preferred
* Experience must be with customer\-facing projects and not internal to the organization
* Experience assisting project management teams with identification of action items, tasks and activities and tracking progress
* Experience at defining, implementing and continually improving standards, processes and procedures utilizing industry best practice (PMI, CMMI, etc.)
* Experience developing project budgets based on the development of Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)


**Benefits**
 We are proud to offer a range of incentives to our employees worldwide. These benefits are available to everyone, regardless of grade, and reflect the values we uphold:
   

  

* Flexibility: Enjoy unlimited vacation, based on your location and business priorities. Hybrid working arrangements, and inclusive policies such as paid time off for voting, bereavement, and sick leave.
* Well\-being: Access Confidential one\-on\-one therapy through our Employee Assistance Program, find support from our network of Wellbeing Champions and Gather Groups, and a calendar of monthly events and initiatives designed to help you thrive \- Inside and Outside of work.
* Medical, life \& disability insurance, retirement plan, lifestyle and other benefits\*
* ESG: Benefit from paid time off for volunteering and donation matching.
* DEI: Participate in multiple DE\&I groups for open involvement (e.g., Count Me In, Culture@Finastra, Proud@Finastra, Disabilities@Finastra, Women@Finastra).
* Career Development: Access online learning and accredited courses through our Skills \& Career Navigator tool.
* Recognition: Be part of our global recognition program, Finastra Celebrates, and contribute to regular employee surveys to help shape Finastra and foster a culture where everyone is engaged and empowered to perform at their best.
* Specific benefits may vary by location.


 At Finastra, each individual is unique, bringing their own ideas, thoughts, cultural beliefs, backgrounds, and experiences together. We learn from one another, embrace and celebrate our differences, and create an environment where everyone feels safe to be themselves.
   

  

 Be unique, be exceptional, and help us make a difference at Finastra!

 is responsible for developing and implementing strategic initiatives to promote American University of Sharjah (AUS), advance its mission, and position it as a premier institution of choice for qualified local and international students.
data.jd_text:
**The Executive Director of Enrollment Management (EDEM)** 
 is responsible for developing and implementing strategic initiatives to promote American University of Sharjah (AUS), advance its mission, and position it as a premier institution of choice for qualified local and international students.
   

  

 The EDEM provides leadership and oversight for key enrollment functions, including:
   

  

* Undergraduate (UG) and graduate (GR) student recruitment and admissions
* The University Testing Center
* The external sponsorships program
* The Welcome Center
* The Contact Center


 Collaborating closely with internal stakeholders, the EDEM ensures alignment with the university’s strategic objectives. This includes conducting periodic assessments, research, and analyses of the higher education landscape to inform data\-driven enrollment strategies and meet institutional targets. Additionally, the EDEM prepares annual enrollment projections to support budget planning.
   

  

 Externally, the EDEM fosters strategic partnerships with Ministries of Education/Higher Education, government agencies, sponsoring entities, high schools, and higher education institutions within and beyond the UAE to strengthen AUS’s enrollment pipeline and reputation.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Oversee the development and implementation of the Office of Enrollment Management (OEM) Multi\-Year Strategic Plan.
* Track inquiries, leads, yields, and application trends to guide decision\-making and improve efficiency.
* Serve on various committees to formulate leveraging strategies, including those related to student success, recruitment and retention, financial grants and scholarships, and a university capacity task force.
* Supervise the planning and execution of the new student orientation program.
* Prepare and maintain the departmental budget, ensuring alignment with institutional strategic enrollment goals and objectives.
* Analyze admission standards and requirements and recommend adjustments for approval by senior leadership.
* Develop print and online informational and promotional materials.
* Serve as the final arbiter on admissions decisions in accordance with established policies.
* Advocate for fair admission policies and ensure equitable treatment of all applicants regardless of background.
* Develop grade concordance tables and matrices for different secondary education systems.
* Establish and monitor the application of academic credential evaluation and assessment standards.
* Monitor the effectiveness of internal admissions processes and policies to ensure they meet key performance indicators.
* Liaise with Ministries of Education and local education councils.
* Develop data\-driven, multi\-year enrollment projection scenarios to establish capacity parameters and budgetary requirements.
* Monitor and assess the growth of the external student sponsorship program and strengthen relationships with sponsoring organizations.
* Represent the university at media events and on\- and off\-campus recruitment functions.
* Develop a recruitment and new\-student communications plan, guiding prospects from initial inquiry through matriculation.
* Develop and implement, in consultation with the recruitment team, an annual comprehensive recruitment campaign plan.
* Co\-manage, with the Strategic Communications and Marketing department, the development of communication plans and the implementation of promotional tools for recruitment campaigns (e.g., social media, advertising).
* Engage colleges/schools, faculty, alumni, and various AUS departments in recruitment efforts to achieve enrollment goals.
* Establish partnership agreements with select high schools locally and internationally to attract highly qualified applicants.
* Lead the integration of automation and artificial intelligence solutions to enhance enrollment operations, improve applicant experience, increase efficiency, and transition key processes from manual to data\-driven digital workflows.


**Qualifications And Skills Required**
* Master’s degree or higher in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Public Administration, Higher Education Administration, or a related field from an accredited institution.
* Proficiency in written and spoken Arabic is considered an asset.
* Strong understanding of the higher education landscape, including emerging trends, regulatory frameworks, and best practices in enrollment management.
* Solid background in developing and implementing admissions policies, academic credential evaluation standards, and related governance frameworks.
* Comprehensive knowledge of diverse high school education systems, grading models, student recruitment strategies, and yield management practices.
* Up\-to\-date expertise in leveraging digital marketing, social media, branding strategies, and evolving demographic trends to support enrollment growth.
* Understanding of the relationship between enrollment strategies and student retention, persistence, and graduation outcomes.
* Demonstrated ability to develop accurate enrollment projections and execute long\-term enrollment strategies aligned with institutional goals.
* Strong analytical and data\-driven decision\-making skills.
* Effective and focused leader with a proven ability to build and motivate high\-performing teams.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with strong stakeholder engagement and relationship\-building capabilities.
* Proven ability to manage budgets efficiently and optimize resource allocation.
* Proficiency in enrollment management systems, data analytics and visualization tools, and marketing automation platforms.
* Strong crisis management and change management capabilities.
* Visionary, innovative, and adaptable leadership style.
* Persuasive, collaborative, and culturally sensitive.
* Strong problem\-solving skills with sound judgment.
* Demonstrates integrity, transparency, fairness, and ethical leadership
* Expert in enrollment data analysis, predictive modeling, CRM tools, and admissions software.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Minimum of 10 years of experience in Higher Education Administration and Management.


**How To Apply**
* Interested applicants should fill out the form.
* AUS alumni are encouraged to apply. Applicants who do not meet specified requirements will not be shortlisted. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
* AUS is an equal opportunity employer. We adhere to a policy of making employment decisions without regard to race, color, age, gender, religion, national origin, disability or marital status. Opportunities for employment are based solely upon one’s qualifications.

**Who We Are**
 At OKX, we believe that the future will be reshaped by crypto, and ultimately contribute to every individual's freedom. OKX is a leading crypto exchange, and the developer of OKX Wallet, giving millions access to crypto trading and decentralized crypto applications (dApps). OKX is also a trusted brand by hundreds of large institutions seeking access to crypto markets. We are safe and reliable, backed by our Proof of Reserves.  *We Before Me* 
 ,
 *Do the Right Thing* 
 , and
 *Get Things Done* 
 . These shared values drive our culture, shape our processes, and foster a friendly, rewarding, and diverse environment for every OK\-er. OKX is part of OKG, a group that brings the value of Blockchain to users around the world, through our leading products OKX, OKX Wallet, OKLink and more.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are seeking a highly experienced and strategic Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead the operational and commercial functions of our UAE Business. This role will oversee the full operational lifecycle—including Sales, Trading, Customer Operations, and Business Support ensuring our business runs efficiently, compliantly, and in alignment with regulatory requirements. The COO will act as a key partner to the regional CEO and global leadership, driving growth, operational excellence, and cross\-functional collaboration across the organization.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
**Executive Operations \& Strategy**
* Oversee day\-to\-day business and commercial operations for the UAE\-regulated entity across Sales, Trading, and Operations.
* Implement scalable, efficient operational systems that align with global and regional business objectives.
* Track and report key KPIs across commercial performance, operational efficiency, customer satisfaction, and risk.
* Partner with the CEO of Middle East and collaborate closely with global leadership to shape and execute strategic initiatives.


**Sales, Trading \& Operational Oversight**
* Provide operational leadership across the sales processes, onboarding, and customer lifecycle management.
* Oversee trading operations, ensuring effective controls, timely issue escalation, and operational resilience.
* Optimize operational support for customer operations and post\-trade processes.
* Support commercial strategy through data\-driven insights, operational improvements, and performance management.


**Product Strategy \&** 
**Localization**
* Partner with global Product, Engineering, and Ops teams to tailor products for the UAE market.
* Ensure operational readiness and internal alignment for new product launches.
* Lead cross\-functional evaluations to confirm compliance with UAE regulatory standards.


**Compliance \& Risk Management**
* Embed UAE regulatory standards into operational workflows
* Act as the first line of defense, ensuring operational activities meet regulatory requirements.
* Maintain risk registers, lead incident reviews, and ensure internal governance discipline.
* Work closely with Legal, Compliance, and Risk teams to support regulatory reporting, audits, and supervisory engagement.


**Performance \& Metrics Monitoring**
* Build and monitor KPIs across commercial, operational, and risk domains.
* Produce regular performance reports for senior management and regulatory stakeholders.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational effectiveness.


**Cross\-Functional Collaboration**
* Work closely with Product, Engineering, Compliance, Legal, Marketing, Customer Ops, Sales, and Trading teams.
* Foster a culture of transparency, accountability, and high performance.


**What We Look For**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics, or related field; MBA preferred.
* 10\+ years of operational leadership within regulated financial services, fintech, trading, brokerage, or crypto.

data.title: Head of Public Policy for Middle East and Africa (MEA)
data.raw_snippet: Snap Inc is a technology company. We believe the camera presents the greatest opportunity to improve the way people live and communicate. data.jd_text:
Snap Inc is a technology company. We believe the camera presents the greatest opportunity to improve the way people live and communicate. Snap contributes to human progress by empowering people to express themselves, live in the moment, learn about the world, and have fun together. The Company’s three core products are Snapchat, a visual messaging app that enhances your relationships with friends, family, and the world; Lens Studio, an augmented reality platform that powers AR across Snapchat and other services; and its AR glasses, Spectacles.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Head of Public Policy, MEA to join Snap Inc. As a member of the EMEA Public Policy team, the role reports to the Senior Director Public Policy EMEA. You will be responsible for the public policy and government relations work across the MEA region, with a particular focus on UAE and Saudi Arabia, as well as Qatar and potentially further afield in Africa. Working from our office in Dubai, you will co\-design, and execute the implementation of the public policy plan for relevant markets. The Middle East and Africa are key growth regions for Snap and our relationships with the governments and other key public stakeholders are of the utmost importance. Ensuring that Snap’s distinctive voice is heard and accommodated in policy\-making circles will be a key priority.
   

  

 The Head of Public Policy is co\-responsible for development of positions on key local and regional policy issues impacting Snap and for developing effective strategies to achieve policy outcomes and mitigate risk. This person will work closely with the rest of the Global Public Policy team, wider Legal team, regional Sales teams, the Communications team, Platform Integrity and Product teams and, on occasion, senior business executives to ensure the public policy program supports business growth and protects the company’s interests.
   

  

 What you’ll do:
   

  

* Serve as the main day\-to\-day policy representative of Snap Inc in the Middle East and Africa. Further deepen relationships with relevant government officials, NGOs, trade associations, non\-governmental organizations, and other influential stakeholders.
* Work closely with the Senior Director EMEA of Public Policy, the EMEA Public Policy team, the SVP Global Policy \& Platform Operations and, on occasion, the senior executive organization.
* Being the Policy spokesperson of the company in the region in various fora, events etc.
* Be the first to act and respond to the appropriate public policy inquiries.
* Collaborate with Public Policy, Legal and Business teams to analyze legislative initiatives, advise on risks and opportunities and develop company policy positions and messaging
* Partner with the Communications team to help them appropriately respond to Policy\-related media inquiries, by providing the correct policy narrative that best represents Snap Inc.


 Knowledge, Skills \& Abilities:
   

  

* A proven ability for shaping, and working with, government officials, NGOs, coalitions and other stakeholder groups.
* Good tech policy understanding and existing relationships within government and the wider stakeholder community in the region.
* Excellent communication and advocacy skills and sound political judgment.
* Forward thinking and proactive ability on legislative, regulatory and public policy issues. Ability to rapidly understand and master complex policy issues.
* Ability to work with Snap business to identify pertinent issues and orient the public policy team to meet priorities.
* Ability to work independently/ self\-starter in a fast\-paced, multicultural environment
* Demonstrated ability to work with a wide range of external groups and individuals, including those who are opponents or critics.
* Teammate with a positive attitude, motivation and a sense of humor
* Articulate and thoughtful.
* Able to adapt communication on complex issues for different audiences.
* A passion for Snapchat and creativity.


 Minimum Qualifications:
   

  

* Master's degree or advanced studies in law/economics/public affairs
* 10\+ years relevant experience in MENA public policy and public affairs
* Strong experience (4\+ years) on MENA tech policy, ideally working on platform regulations


 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  

* Working experience in Dubai or Riyadh
* Previous experience working with the Government or regulators or other Public institutions is a plus
* Full Arabic and English proficiency necessary


 If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please don’t be shy and provide us some information.
   

  

 "Default Together" Policy at Snap: At Snap Inc. we believe that being together in person helps us build our culture faster, reinforce our values, and serve our community, customers and partners better through dynamic collaboration. To reflect this, we practice a “default together” approach and expect our team members to work in an office 4\+ days per week.
   

  

 At Snap, we believe that having a team of diverse backgrounds and voices working together will enable us to create innovative products that improve the way people live and communicate. Snap is proud to be an equal opportunity employer, and committed to providing employment opportunities regardless of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding, age, sexual orientation, military or veteran status, or any other protected classification, in accordance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. EOE, including disability/vets.
   

  

 Our Benefits: Snap Inc. is its own community, so we’ve got your back! We do our best to make sure you and your loved ones have everything you need to be happy and healthy, on your own terms. Our benefits are built around your needs and include paid parental leave, comprehensive medical coverage, emotional and mental health support programs, and compensation packages that let you share in Snap’s long\-term success!

data.jd_text:
2 Hour Learning seeks a technical product leader with the expertise to architect and modernize our AI\-driven learning ecosystem. This position demands someone capable of functioning at CTO\-level technical depth while maintaining sharp product vision—applying both to transform student outcomes at scale.
   

  

 Where others append AI to conventional education frameworks as an add\-on, we've taken a fundamentally different approach: constructing an entirely new school model anchored in AI and learning science, eliminating the limitations inherent in traditional classrooms. The results speak plainly—our students achieve multiple 4s and 5s on AP exams, demonstrate multi\-year academic advancement within single academic years, and routinely exceed their own performance expectations. When AI serves as the foundational operating system for learning, student achievement reaches new heights.
   

  

 This position diverges from conventional product management centered on feedback cycles and incremental releases. You will hold executive\-level technical product ownership, commanding the architecture, technical roadmap, and AI integration across our complete learning platform. Your mandate includes making critical technical trade\-offs that keep our products lean, scalable, and laser\-focused on student outcome improvement. You'll combine CTO\-level thinking with product entrepreneurship, merging engineering discipline with learning science to drive continuous innovation.
   

  

 If you possess both the ambition to lead education's technical transformation and the execution discipline to deliver on it, we invite your application. This role offers the opportunity to architect the future of learning.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Cultivating and applying comprehensive education product expertise to inform strategic direction
* Creating technical specifications that resolve critical technical decisions while prioritizing simplicity, efficiency, and sustainable architecture
* Deploying generative AI capabilities to automate engineering workflows and reduce manual effort, consistent with our strategic commitment to operational efficiency


**What You Won’t Be Doing**
* Managing people as your primary function; this role centers on your technical and business judgment
* Spending time on meetings, committees, or administrative overhead; we've automated management tasks to free you for value\-creation through direct contribution
* Proposing abstract strategies disconnected from execution; your guidance must stem from product\-level understanding


**Vice President Of Product Engineering Key Responsibilities**
* Serve as the CTO for one or more education products, owning core technical capabilities and generating business value through flawless execution and strategic leadership


**Basic Requirements**
* 7\+ years of experience making critical architecture and design decisions on software projects, including application of architecture design patterns or major open source technologies
* 4\+ years of experience in roles with complete technical and delivery ownership over a revenue\-generating product
* Experience leveraging AI agents to design, implement, and test software products or features


**About 2 Hour Learning**
 Education is broken, but 2 Hour Learning is proving it doesn’t have to be. They’re tearing down the outdated one\-size\-fits\-all model and replacing it with AI\-driven personalized learning that helps kids master academics in just two hours a day.
   

  

**With students consistently ranking in the top 1\-2% nationally and the top 20% achieving an astonishing 6\.5x growth, they’re proving that smarter learning is possible. At 2 Hour Learning, it’s talent and performance that matter.**
 They offer a dynamic, on\-campus and remote\-friendly environment where innovators, educators, and AI specialists can be a part of fixing a broken school system.
   

  

**2 Hour Learning is reprogramming learning for the AI era.**
**Here’s How They’re Fixing It.**
 There is so much to cover for this exciting role, and space here is limited. Hit the Apply button if you found this interesting and want to learn more. We look forward to meeting you!
   

  

**Working with us**
 This is a full\-time (40 hours per week), long\-term position. The position is immediately available and requires entering into an independent contractor agreement with Crossover as a Contractor of Record. The compensation level for this role is $200 USD/hour, which equates to $400,000 USD/year assuming 40 hours per week and 50 weeks per year. The payment period is weekly. Consult www.crossover.com/help\-and\-faqs for more details on this topic.

 As VP of Engineering, you will act as the organisation’s top engineering authority, with full ownership of the function, spanning execution, organisational design, global delivery models, AI integration, platform strategy, and capability building.
 



  





**1\. Engineering Operations \& Delivery** 



* Optimise the software development lifecycle (SDLC) end\-to\-end
* Improve QA processes, release cycles, and production reliability
* Increase deployment efficiency and code quality standards
* Introduce clear metrics, accountability, and delivery discipline



  





**2\. Squad Design \& Team Restructuring** 



* Restructure the existing team into 3–5 high\-performing squads
* Define roles, responsibilities, and squad ownership models
* Identify skill gaps, underperformance, and restructuring needs
* Balance upskilling vs selective replacement within budget constraints



  





**3\. Engineering Performance Uplift** 



* Drive a culture of high standards and accountability
* Improve output per engineer without increasing headcount
* Mentor Engineering Managers and senior engineers
* Build a clear understanding of who owns what and why



  





**4\. Technical Improvement Priorities** 



* Stabilise and improve payment systems
* Drive architecture improvements and modernisation
* Build/upgrade data infrastructure for analytics and decision\-making
* Implement iterative, pragmatic rebuild strategies (not big bang)



  





**We are seeking an engineering leader who has the following:** 



* 15\+ years in software engineering, with at least five years in a senior engineering leadership role (VP, Head of Engineering, or equivalent) spanning multiple teams or geographies.
* Proven track record of transforming underperforming teams
* Strong experience managing multiple squads (3–5\+)
* Deep understanding of engineering operations \& SDLC optimisation
* Hands\-on technical background (able to challenge architecture decisions)
* Hands\-on involvement in AI/ML engineering programmes or AI\-driven developer productivity initiatives.
* Experience in consumer technology, marketplace, or multi\-sided platform businesses strongly preferred.

data.jd_text:
90% of vibe coding projects never become real software.
 



 People build fast. They generate features, fix bugs, add pages.
 



 But they can't ship. Because they have no idea what they actually built.
 



 No structure. No tracking. No path to production.
 



  





 That's not a tool problem. That's a category gap — and nobody's closing it.
 



 We are.
 



  





 Codelogs.ai turns AI\-coded projects into real, shippable software. The operating system above Lovable, Bolt, and V0\.
 



  





 Built. Live. First users in. First positive market and pmf signals received. Target: €1M MRR. 12 months. Max 10 people.
 



  





 \-\-\-
 



  





 We're hiring a CTO. Co\-Founder Level.
 



  





 Not a senior engineer. Not a tech lead.
 



  





 You are the engineering team. You ship. You talk to users. You track what's working. You iterate. Daily. No manager sets your priorities. No PM writes your tickets. You open Claude Code at 7am because you already know what to build next.
 



  





 The product is built: Chrome Extension, full\-stack, clean codebase, documented. Clean handover on day one. You're not starting from scratch. You're taking it to exit.
 



  





 What that means day\-to\-day:
 



 → Ship working product every single day: features, fixes, experiments
 



 → Own the product end\-to\-end: architecture, performance, new features
 



 → Run customer interviews yourself. Find patterns, feed them into the roadmap
 



 → Build and own the data layer: usage tracking, retention signals, drop\-off points
 



 → Use Claude Code / Cursor as your primary build method
 



 → Make product decisions \- you won't be handed a spec sheet
 



 → Lay the foundation so that when we hire, onboarding takes days, not months
 



  





 Remote. Fully available. Full product ownership.
 



  





**You're not working for a first\-time founder.** 




 Volker Hein. Former SAP CTO, responsible for sales in 16 countries. Spent the last 5 years building a 7\-figure consulting business helping software CEOs scale and exit. He founded Codelogs out of his own frustration with AI\-driven development. This is hands\-on with someone who's actually done it.
 



  





 \-\-\-
 



  





 You're a fit if:
 



 You've done this before. You've taken a product from early traction to exit or close enough that you know what that year actually costs.
 



 You ship the day the idea lands, not the day the spec is approved.
 



 You read your own metrics. You fix things before anyone asks.
 



 Speed isn't your goal, it's your default.
 



 → You've shipped full\-stack products solo or in a very tiny team
 



 → You've worked with Chrome Extensions or browser\-native environments
 



 → You write clean code fast and know when "clean enough to ship" is the right call
 



 → You treat customer conversations as engineering input, not a distraction
 



 → You use AI coding tools at an agentic level, not Copilot autocomplete, actual workflows
 



 → You instrument your own features and actually look at the data
 



  





 Not for you if:
 



 → You want "frontend" or "backend", not both and everything else
 



 → You need someone to write the tickets
 



 → You prefer planning over shipping
 



 → You're not comfortable talking directly to customers
 



 \-\-\-
 



 This is a 996 role. Founder\-level responsibility, founder\-level upside.
 



 If that sounds exhausting, this isn't for you.
 



 If that sounds like finally the right room, read on.
 



  





 Compensation: Equity\-based compensation. Discussed openly.
 



  





 \-\-\-
 



  





 To apply, pick one:
 



 1\. Send a 60\-second Loom: a product you shipped and what broke along the way
 



 2\. One paragraph: the hardest technical decision you made under pressure and would you make it again?
 



 3\. DM me with what you'd build in the first 30 days at Codelogs and why

data.raw_snippet:
**About QNB**

data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
   

  

 QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard \& Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3\) and Fitch (A\+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
   

  

 Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
   

  

 QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The incumbent will be primarily responsible for managing on a day\-to\-day basis a portfolio of existing and potential Senior/large corporate customers to meet assigned financial targets of assigned country location. Incumbent is expected to develop and profitably manage banking relationships for business customers within their geographic territory or industry/customer portfolio. This position functions as the primary resource for extension of the full range of bank products and services applicable to the business customer. These will typically include credit and deposit services, as well as international transactions or other specialized services.
   

  

 Main Responsibilities
   

  

* Shareholder \& Financial:
* Play a major role in the implementation of the strategies and plan to achieve all set volume, revenue and profit targets for the Corporate Banking function within the assigned country location and in accordance with QNB’s overall corporate budget and strategy.
* Come up consistently with business ideas to help boost revenues
* Develop Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for the purpose of performance monitoring and quality measurement of the Corporate Banking Unit and monitor their achievements on periodic basis.
* Observes and promotes cost consciousness and efficiency, and enhance productivity, to minimize costs, avoid wastes, and optimize benefits for the bank.
* Act within the limits of the powers delegated to the incumbent and adheres to QNB policies. Delegate’s authority to the respective staff and monitor exercise of the same.
* Customer (Internal \& External):
* Develop and manage on a day\-to\-day basis potential corporate customers and assigned portfolio of existing customers to meet assigned financial and non\-financial targets in compliance with established QNB credit policies, procedures and standards.
* Build and maintain strong and effective relationships with all related functions / units to achieve assigned goals / objectives.
* Responsible for the day to day management of the Relationship Manager (RM) and Assistant Relationship Manager (ARM). Ensure appropriate direction of work and duties and that RM and ARM has relevant training and support.
* Responsible for business development and origination as well as credit recommendations in favour of selected local and regional corporations
* Provide timely and accurate information to the Head of Corporate \& Institutional Banking and head office regarding credit and compliance issues in local and regional markets
* Provide timely and accurate information to the external and internal auditors when required.
* To assist customers in all their queries on Bank’s product and seek solution to their requests.
* Maintain activities in accordance with Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with internal departments/units to achieve improvements in turn\-around time.
* Provide timely/accurate data to external/internal Auditors, Compliance, Financial Control and Risk when required.
* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Prepare comprehensive credit proposals for new/prospect customers that adequately address all relevant risk factors and satisfy minimum acceptable standards of CPM.
* At least one month before expiry, prepare comprehensive credit review for existing portfolio's that adequately address all relevant and current risk factors and the latest developments in the industry, market and business.
* Stress and document periodic calling on customers to capture ongoing businesses and encourage reliance on QNB.
* Stress account management to enhance utilization of lines.
* Restrict excess/ casual facilities and maintain the relationship within the approved boundaries.
* Identify and timely report on all negative events and early signals on potential problematic accounts/ relationships.
* Obtain all requisite facility and account documentation to ensure each customer's file is current with valid legal documentation to secure/ protect the bank's interests.
* Identify opportunities and resolve problems with customer relationships and coordinate appropriate measures with concerned departments to ensure consistent, timely and accurate delivery of products and services to assigned CB customers.
* Coordinate with line departments and counterparts to communicate, discuss and resolve\-problems in a teamwork fashion.
* To assist customers in all their queries on Bank’s product and seek solution to their requests
* Maintain activities in accordance with Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with internal departments/ units to achieve improvements in turn\-around time.
* Build and maintain strong and effective relationship with all other related departments and units to achieve the Group’s goals/objectives.
* Provide timely and accurate information to the external and internal Auditors, Compliance, Financial Control and Risk Functions as and when required.
* Continuous Improvement:
* Set examples by leading improvement initiatives through cross\-functional teams ensuring successes.
* Identify and encourage people to adopt practices better than the industry standard.
* Continuously encourage and recognise the importance of thinking out\-of\-the\-box within the team.
* Encourage, solicit and reward innovative ideas even in day\-to\-day issues.
* Learning \& Knowledge:
* Possess sound knowledge of QNB’s credit policies, procedures and standards.
* Takes responsibility for self\-development as well as acquiring skills and knowledge required to fulfilment of one's duties by proactively identifying areas for professional development of self and undertake development activities
* Seek out opportunities to remain current with all developments in professional field
* Hold meetings with any assigned staff and assess their performance as well as the function’s overall performance on a regular basis
* Take decisive action to ensure speedy resolution of unresolved grievances or conflicts within the team members.
* Identify development opportunities and activities for staff and facilitate/coach them to improve their effectives and prepare them to assume greater responsibilities.
* Legal, Regulatory, and Risk Framework Responsibilities:
* Comply with all applicable legal, regulatory and internal compliance requirements including, but not limited to, Group Compliance Policies and Procedures (AML \& CTF, Anti\-Bribery and Corruption, Sanctions Policy, Data Protection Policy, Fraud Control Policy, Whistle Blowing Policy, Conflict of Interest and Insider Dealing Policy).
* Understand and effectively perform your role under the Three Lines of Defence principle to identify measure, monitor, manage and report risks.
* Ensure systematic good outcomes for clients in accordance with Conduct Risk policy.
* Support the framework of RCSA, KRI, Incident reporting and remediation, as appropriate, in accordance with the Operational Risk Management requirements.
* Maintain appropriate knowledge to ensure full qualification to undertake the role.
* Complete all mandatory training provided by the Bank, attain, and maintain the required levels of competence.
* Attend mandatory (internal and external) seminars as instructed by the Bank.
* Other:
* Ensure high standards of data protection and confidentiality to safeguard commercially sensitive information.
* Maintaining utmost confidentiality concerning customer and internal bank information obtained during the course of business and provide such information on a need to know basis only to Senior Management of QNB, Audit and Compliance functions, and relevant Regulators.
* Maintain high professional standards to uphold QNB's reputation and to strengthen its market leadership position.
* All other ad hoc duties/activities related to QNB that management might request from time to time.


**Education And Experience Requirements**
* University graduate (Bachelor’s degree) preferably with a Major in Finance, Banking, Economics, Mathematics, or Business Administration (related field of study), Masters preferred
* Excellent oral and written communication skills (including report writing) in English. Arabic, French or applicable local language highly desirable.
* Ideal candidate should possess relevant relationship management experience built on sound credit background, with 12 years additional relevant banking experience.
* Good knowledge of the banking and commercial environment of the country.
* Ability to solve problems and adopt a hands\-on role to meet financial targets.
* Computer literate able to compose own correspondences/ reports using bank standard applications.
* Good oral and written communication skills both in local and English language.


 Note: you will be required to attach the following:
   

  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of your Passport
* Copy of Education Certificate

The college is seeking a visionary academic leader with the responsibilities of ensuring smoot
data.jd_text:
The College of Engineering (CEN) at American University of Sharjah (AUS) invites applicants for the position of the Head of the Department of Chemical and Biological Engineering (CHBE) starting Fall 2027\. The college is seeking a visionary academic leader with the responsibilities of ensuring smooth and successful operation and sustainable development of the department.
   

  

 The candidate for the position must hold earned degrees, including a doctorate, in chemical engineering or a related field. The candidate must have demonstrated leadership in research, as evidenced by her/his outstanding publication record. In addition, a demonstrated record of excellence in teaching, and in academic and relevant professional services is required. The selected individual will have the opportunity to develop and articulate a vision and long\-range plan for the department in teaching and in research strategy that embodies the relevant areas that are vital to the department and the region. Special consideration will be given to candidates with a clear vision and achievable goals that are in line with the college’s and university’s strategic plans.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The successful candidate must be a dynamic, collaborative, visionary and innovative individual with demonstrated leadership experience that can promote the continued advancement of the department. He/she is expected to have strong communication skills to effectively engage with a wide variety of constituents within and outside the university. His/her leadership style should include positive attitude, transparency, integrity, trust, fairness, promptness and collegiality. In addition to the general and wide responsibilities of the department head position, as partially outlined in the
 *Faculty Handbook* 
 , the selected applicant will be required to:
   

  

* provide effective leadership with well\-defined plans to nurture and elevate the standard of the department, accompanied with the development of short\-term and long\-term strategies in alignment with the strategic plans of the college and the university
* ensure high\-quality teaching as well as holistic development of the students, using approaches such as technology supported delivery, problem\-based learning, and other cutting\-edge trends in engineering education, in addition to leading the continuous improvement of the curriculum
* facilitate the conduct of innovative and cutting\-edge research of high\-quality and impact and promote multidisciplinary research with the optimal use of research funds and research facilities
* empower, mentor, promote, inspire and support faculty and staff to develop and sustain excellence in teaching, research and service
* foster a positive culture of innovation and entrepreneurship among faculty and students
* improve continuously teaching, research and service through benchmarking
* lead the department in achieving student recruitment goals by establishing and implementing recruitment plans for undergraduate and graduate students
* enrich the students’ experience via enhanced services, exchange visits, invited speakers, field trips, student clubs, professional certifications, competitions, conferences, etc.
* secure full\-time and internship positions and provide undergraduate research experience to the students
* participate in outreach activities, including maintaining ties and collaborations with alumni, industry, government, advisory boards, other university units and community members, and maintaining involvement in local and international professional organizations
* advertise locally and publicly the achievements and expertise of the faculty, staff and students of the department through web, newsletters and media exposure to enhance the academic reputation of the program
* collect data systematically and continuously from the department to plan and execute informed decisions
* ensure and increase diversity and equity in faculty hiring and student recruitment
* maintain and actively promote a positive, safe, transparent, fair, open, respectful, collegial working environment at the department, college and university
* interact and communicate effectively with individual faculty, staff and students (and parents) on a range of professional and personal issues
* represent the faculty and staff and convey their needs to the college’s and university’s administration.
* oversee the department’s operations including scheduling, advising, registration, lab preparations, budget allocation, compliance and risk management, etc.
* review and coordinate faculty course releases, sabbaticals and leave without pay requests
* conduct fair faculty and staff annual evaluations and provide effective feedback
* evaluate faculty and staff for promotion and/or rolling contract decisions
* lead and manage accreditation visits
* performing other duties as needed or assigned by the Dean


 Applicants should fill out an application form and upload the required documents (PDF) using the following \<a href\="javascript:aus\_external\_warning\_ShowExternalUrlDialog("https://acg\-apps1\.aus.edu/cen/empapp/apply.php?p\=CHE\-DH\-26\-01");"\>link. The required documents are a cover letter and a detailed curriculum vitae (including a teaching statement, a research statement, vision and goals for the department, list of courses that can be taught or were taught, and names of at least three references who would be willing to write letters of recommendation). Positions are open until filled. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
   

  

 The Department of Chemical and Biological Engineering has approximately 200 undergraduate students, 15 graduate students, 12 full\-time faculty and 3 lab instructors. Students and faculty represent very diverse backgrounds and nationalities; approximately 90 nationalities are present on campus. The department offers a Bachelor of Science in Chemical Engineering, a Bachelor of Science in Chemical and Biological Engineering, and a Master of Science in Chemical Engineering.
   

  

 AUS is located in the Emirate of Sharjah (about 15 km from Dubai). AUS is an independent, not\-for\-profit, coeducational university, serving more than 5,700 students. Further information can be obtained here.
   

  

 AUS is licensed and its programs are accredited by the Commission for Academic Accreditation of the Ministry of Education's Higher Education Affairs Division in the United Arab Emirates. AUS has been accredited in the United States of America by the Middle States Commission on Higher Education (1007 North Orange Street, 4th Floor, MB \#166, Wilmington, DE 19801 USA) since June 2004\. The Bachelor of Science in Chemical Engineering offered by the College of Engineering is accredited by the Engineering Accreditation Commission of ABET, \<a href\="javascript:aus\_external\_warning\_ShowExternalUrlDialog("http://www.abet.org/");"\>http://www.abet.org/.

**Make an impact with NTT DATA**
 Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.
   

  

**Your day at NTT DATA**
 As a Cybersecurity BU Head at NTT DATA, you will be responsible for driving the growth and strategic direction of NTT DATA’s cybersecurity business across the region. This role combines advanced subject matter expertise with direct sales accountability, overseeing pipeline development, client engagement, and team leadership.
   

  

 The BU Head works closely with Client Managers, pre\-sales architects, and technology partners to pursue qualified leads, develop tailored solutions, and close complex deals. The role also involves expanding market presence, building strategic vendor relationships, and mentoring a team of cybersecurity sales specialists.
   

  

 You'll play a vital role in developing and maintaining strong relationships with new and existing clients, conducting workshops, and delivering impactful presentations. Your expertise in security technology will enable you to support the closure of sales, address conceptual challenges, and maintain a comprehensive knowledge of our product and service offerings.
   

  

 You'll be responsible for creating clear account plans, identifying client risks, and using sales methodologies to drive the sales process. Your ability to adapt quickly to new missions and deadlines, along with your client\-centric approach to finding the best\-fit solutions, will significantly impact achieving our sales goals.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, you need to have:**
* An advanced understanding of security principles, concepts, and technologies, including NIST CSF, ISO 27001, and best practices in securing DATA and IT infrastructure.
* An excellent understanding of the technical concepts of security solutions and the ability to provide technical consultation to customers.
* Proven success in solution\-based selling and achieving/exceeding sales targets
* Strong client relationship skills up to the C\-level, with the ability to deliver engaging sales presentations.
* The ability to maintain up\-to\-date, accurate sales forecasts and close plans.
* Proficiency in team\-selling approaches and collaboration with internal teams.
* Knowledge of competitors and the ability to apply successful sales strategies.
* Flexibility to adapt swiftly to new missions, urgent deadlines, and changing client needs.
* A bachelor's degree or equivalent in a technical or sales field is preferred.
* Industry/Vendor sales certifications required.


**Workplace type:**
 Hybrid Working
   

  

**About NTT DATA**
 NTT DATA is a $30\+ billion trusted global innovator of business and technology services. data.jd_text:
**About the Role:** 




 The Director People \& Culture \- Store Operations leads the People \& Culture business partnership function for restaurant operations across all brands and markets within Americana Restaurants.
 



 The role translates business priorities into scalable, consistent and high\-impact people strategies, policies, and operational practices that support a consistent and high\-performing workforce across the store network.
 



 Working closely with brand leadership and operational teams, the role ensures that people practices across workforce planning, employee relations, performance management, and engagement are implemented consistently and aligned with Americana’s values and strategic priorities.
 



 Through strong governance, data\-driven decision making, and execution rigor the Director ensures Human Capital initiatives translate into measurable improvements in workforce stability, leadership capability, employee experience, and operational performance.
 



 This role provides leadership and direction to the People \& Culture business partnership teams supporting restaurant operations across brands and markets, ensuring consistent standards, coordination, and execution of Human Capital priorities across a large, multi\-country workforce.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




**Operational People Strategy \& Business Partnership** 



* Partner with brand and operations leadership to translate business strategy into clear, actionable workforce and people priorities across the restaurant network.
* Provide strategic HR guidance to senior operations leaders on workforce planning, leadership capability, and organizational effectiveness.
* Align Human Capital initiatives with operational goals including growth, service excellence, and operational consistency.



**Human Capital Operations Governance** 



* Drive consistent implementation of people policies, processes, and initiatives across brands and countries.
* Ensure alignment between enterprise Human Capital strategy and local operational execution while balancing local market realities.



**Operational Workforce Strategy** 



* Lead workforce strategies that support restaurant network growth, labor productivity, and operational stability.
* Partner with Operations and Finance to align workforce planning with expansion plans, staffing models, and labor requirements.
* Ensure strong talent pipelines and succession depth for restaurant leadership roles across markets.



**Workforce Performance Management** 



* Monitor key workforce indicators including attrition, workforce stability, leadership readiness, and engagement across the restaurant network.
* Identify workforce trends and implement targeted, data\-backed actions that strengthen operational stability and employee experience.
* Ensure people priorities are reflected in operational reviews and leadership decision making.



**Employee Relations \& Workplace Environment** 



* Oversee employee relations practices across markets to ensure fair, consistent, and values\-aligned decision making.
* Ensure workplace issues are managed in line with company values, policies, and legal frameworks.
* Promote a culture of accountability, respect, and integrity across the operational workforce.



**People Analytics \& Workforce Insights** 



* Use people analytics to identify workforce trends, operational risks, and capability gaps across markets.
* Translate workforce data into actionable insights that support leadership decision making and operational planning.
* Strengthen workforce reporting and data quality to enable effective operational decision making.



**Execution Discipline \& Operational Coordination** 



* Ensure Human Capital initiatives are implemented consistently and effectively across markets.
* Coordinate the execution of enterprise people initiatives across brands and countries.
* Establish clear accountability and follow\-through for operational people actions and track impact of key initiatives.



**Operational Leadership Capability** 



* Partner with Talent and Learning teams to strengthen leadership capability across store operations.
* Identify leadership gaps that impact operational performance and employee engagement.
* Ensure development priorities for restaurant leadership roles align with business needs and future leadership pipeline requirements.



**Culture \& Values Alignment** 



* Champion the consistent application of Americana’s values across the operational workforce.
* Ensure people decisions reinforce the company’s culture and leadership expectations while strengthening a performance\-driven environment.
* Promote leadership behaviors that strengthen engagement, accountability, and team performance.



**Stakeholder Leadership** 



* Act as the senior People \& Culture partner to operational leadership across brands and markets.
* Build strong relationships with brand leaders, country leadership teams, and P\&C leaders.
* Influence leadership decisions through credible business insight and strong people expertise.



  





**Qualifications \& Experience:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field.
* 15\+ years of progressive HR experience with significant experience in HR business partnership within large\-scale operational environments.
* Proven experience managing HR operations across high\-volume, geographically dispersed workforces.
* Experience working in international or multi\-country organizations.
* Strong expertise in employee relations, workforce planning, and HR governance.
* Experience using workforce data and analytics to inform people decisions and business strategy.



  





**Key Skills:** 



* Strategic HR business partnership
* HR operations governance and execution
* Workforce planning and organizational effectiveness
* Employee relations and workplace management
* Data\-driven decision making
* Stakeholder influence and leadership alignment
* Cross\-market coordination and operational leadership
* Strong execution discipline and problem solving

data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**About us**
 With over 200 brands sold in nearly 180 countries, we’re the world’s leading premium drinks company. Bring your passion and use your curiosity as you explore, collaborate, and innovate to build brands consumers love. Together with passionate people from all over the
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**About us**
 With over 200 brands sold in nearly 180 countries, we’re the world’s leading premium drinks company. Bring your passion and use your curiosity as you explore, collaborate, and innovate to build brands consumers love. Together with passionate people from all over the world, you’ll test new ideas, learn and grow, and unlock a brighter, more exciting future.
   

  

 Join us to create a career worth celebrating.
   

  

**About The Function**
 Our Sales team love building relationships, connecting with customers to sell our much\-loved brands in new and vibrant markets where they can thrive. They help sell our iconic brands across 180 countries every year.
   

  

 We’re operating across different markets, channels, and areas of expertise. Using your curiosity and passion, you’ll make the most of consumer insight and digital platforms, reaching new customers, markets, and celebrations to help us achieve our growth potential. We’ll support your learning and growth as you develop your career with us and work with people across our business to realise your fullest potential
   

  

**Market Context and Role Scope**
 The Middle East and North Africa (MENA) is one of the most complex, volatile and opportunity\-rich regions globally, characterised by rapid growth, regulatory sensitivity and significant diversity across markets. The region spans 17 countries, including sanctioned and dry markets, and serves a population of approximately 500 million people with highly diverse cultural, religious and socio\-economic profiles. With around 95% of the population Muslim, the beverage alcohol industry operates in a uniquely sensitive environment where reputation, compliance and stakeholder management are critical to sustainable success.
   

  

 The total beverage alcohol landscape in MENA is shaped by frequent shifts in political, cultural and religious dynamics, resulting in evolving government legislation, changing consumer behaviour and continual Route to Market complexity. Success in the region requires sophisticated RTM design, strong distributor partnerships and the ability to adapt at pace to changing regulatory and market conditions.
   

  

 At the same time, MENA is undergoing a structural transformation. Governments are accelerating diversification agendas most notably through Saudi Vision 2030 and UAE Vision 2030 to reposition the region as a global hub for tourism, hospitality and luxury experiences. This evolution creates significant long\-term growth opportunities for Diageo, particularly across on\-trade, travel retail, luxury, local bottling, non\-alcoholic beverages and emerging alternative channels.
   

  

 Within this context, MENA represents a strategically critical growth engine for Diageo, encompassing developed, emerging and frontier markets, primarily operating through distributor\-led models. The Commercial Director – MENA leads across this breadth and complexity, shaping differentiated market and channel strategies, unlocking growth through premiumisation and innovation, and ensuring Diageo wins responsibly and sustainably across on\-trade, B2B, travel retail and increasingly omni\-channel and e\-commerce routes to market.
   

  

 Within MENA, the Gulf remains the biggest region in terms of NSV mainly driven by the UAE. The region will be driving the growth of MENA in the next 5 years.
   

  

 UAE being the biggest market in the region, it showcases a mix of 4 channels:
   

  

* Very advanced On\-trade where the biggest global groups are operating in Dubai.
* Fast\-growing retail channel which is yet untapped for Diageo although it doubled year on year
* E\-commerce with Spirits now being sold online.
* FTZ Middle East, a strong yet volatile channel that needs close control on pricing and stock movement.


**Purpose of the role**
 The Head of Gulf is a key member of the Commercial Team and reports to the MENA Commercial Director. This highly strategic role will be responsible for driving value market share and best practices in well\-established markets like UAE and build and develop new RTC in markets like Saudi Arabia. The role leads and inspires an international team of 6 FTEs and extended team of Diageo’s distributors in the region.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the development and implementation of the market strategy to optimize growth opportunities, market share win and profit enhancement.
* Create value by locking strategic pricing and trade terms across the value chain and by achieving the triple Win for Diageo, Distributor and Customer.
* Develop an omnichannel strategy ensuring a cohesive consumer experience across all channels (e\-com, on trade and off trade).
* Lead the relationship with key and relevant stakeholders (external and internal), especially distributors while keeping a sustainable, mutually profitable and strong partnership.
* Lead the negotiation with distributors while securing access to depletions and relevant market data to increase action plan and strategies efficiency.
* Lead the RTC agenda by assessing the right distributor model for the right business (Alc and Non Alc)
* Build a strong launch plan for Saudi Non\-Alc Business which will help define opportunity size and build the right RTC to cater market demand.
* Unlock regional deals for Diageo MENA while leveraging on on\-trade groups operating in different MENA countries.
* Overlook relationship with key customers within the region while ensuring strong JUBP and tailor\-made approach based on customer specificity.
* Build, lead and coach a strong team that will enable us to enhance our effective presence in the market.


**Experience / Skills Required**
* 12\-15 years of successful experience in commercial function, with at least six years in a senior role in


 matrixed environments with FMCG blue chip multinationals
   

  

* Experience in leading a big and successful in\-market RTC Change.
* Essential commercial insight and experience. Preferable if gained through cross\-functional working. Demonstrates numerical and financial skills.
* Proven ability to persuade, influence and build credibility with all levels and all functions.
* Strong Analytical, persuasive selling, negotiation and decision\-making skills.
* Experience in planning and orchestrating available limited resources to achieve ambitious growth targets.
* Excellent coaching and relationship building skills. Demonstrates a track record as a valued coach and peer in the business.
* Has held commercial roles with full P\&L accountability.
* Track record in building and executing effective commercial strategy in a competitive environment while ensuring strong brand presence and leadership.


**Diversity statement**
 Our purpose is to celebrate life, every day, everywhere. And creating an inclusive culture, where everyone feels valued and that they can belong, is a crucial part of this.
   

  

 We embrace diversity in the broadest possible sense. This means that you’ll be welcomed and celebrated for who you are just by being you. You’ll be part of and help build and champion an inclusive culture that celebrates people of different gender, ethnicity, ability, age, sexual orientation, social class, educational backgrounds, experiences, mindsets, and more.
   

  

 Our ambition is to create the best performing, most trusted and respected consumer products companies in the world. Join us and help transform our business as we take our brands to the next level and build new ones as part of shaping the next generation of celebrations for consumers around the world.
   

  

 Feel inspired? Then this may be the opportunity for you. If you require a reasonable adjustment, please ensure that you capture this information when you submit your application.
   

  

**Worker Type**
 Regular
   

  

**Primary Location:**
 Dubai
   

  

**Additional Locations :**
**Job Posting Start Date**
 2026\-03\-30
